Please invest in better-trained, more professional staff, and improve your overall systems — not just to please customers, but to do your job properly. I work in this industry myself, and I follow strict rules and standards. I love my profession, and I do it with care, making sure every customer feels satisfied and respected — because that’s how you build a good reputation and a strong international image. There’s no reason Morocco shouldn’t be among the best in aviation. We can aim higher. Please take this seriously. Best of luck.

Name: Kofi Andoh A
Comments: It's the most insensitive and uninspiring airline. They left the luggage of over 50 passengers in Casablanca, including mine, without communication. They abandoned passengers and asked us to go to hell. I lost the luggage, which frustrated me, and they refused to offer any reasonable explanation.

Name: funmilola o
Comments: Royal airmaroc is the worst airline u can take, I flew from lagos to London had a lay over in casablanca. When i got to Gatwick only for me to not see my remaining one baggage, I call them, fill the inventory form sent it back and even do all the things they told me to do but still I didn't see me baggage and they didn't even pay damages still. I won't advice anyone to use their airline. I even sent pictures of my a look alike baggage in case they see it, I told them what it is inside the bag which very valuable to me because those things are my equipment for work and other important things that are expensive but no response from them. I was pained, cried now they are expensive in UK.

Name: Shade B
Comments: Worst airline experience ever and I travel alot. Always delays because they are poorly organised. I missed my RAM connection because their flight was late, I arrived in Casablanca the staff told me to pass security and still go to the gate to arrive to a closed gate and I had to come all the way back queue for a new tickets and no one apologises, no staff gives any explanation or they just lie. They booked a flight for the following day giving me no choice, they told some people they would have to repay a ticket knowing they are the reasons they lost their flights. So I lost a day of work having to stay in a cheap hotel they offered in Morroco. Following day again over 1h delay..honestly if you can avoid this airline avoid, their services is terrible and unreliable plus staff never apologies for their bad services.

Name: bridiehill
Comments: Our experience with Royal Air Maroc was nothing short of appalling, and I strongly urge others to avoid this airline. We paid a premium for an international flight in April, only to be told at the airport -with zero warning - that the flight was overbooked. Despite holding confirmed tickets, we were denied boarding. No apology, no real explanation, just a cold "you won't be able to fly today." The next available flight wasn’t for 24 hours, and the staff offered no real support. We were passed around between multiple employees, each giving contradictory and vague information. Eventually, we were dumped in what can only be described as the worst hotel imaginable - dirty rooms, no air conditioning, terrible food, and unhelpful staff who clearly didn’t want to deal with stranded airline passengers. When we asked about compensation, we were again given conflicting answers. One person said we’d be reimbursed, another said no compensation was available, and others just redirected us to vague online forms. It is now July, and one of my friends who was stranded with me still hasn’t received so much as an email reply from Royal Air Maroc - despite sending multiple messages and following up. Weeks go by without any response. There is no working customer service phone number, no one to talk to, and absolutely no accountability. For an airline that charges high prices, the lack of professionalism, care, and basic service is shocking. We were treated like a problem to be ignored - not paying customers who had our plans wrecked by the airline's own failures. A similar incident happened last year with EasyJet and they were fantastic in sorting out accomodation, transfers and a new flight. If you value reliability, basic communication, or even minimal decency, do not fly Royal Air Maroc.

Name: Ismail K
Comments: Rude staff at both JFK and NKC. Brought 11 bags for checkin but only got stickers for 10. I Noticed the issue right after getting boarding pass and told the same guy who helped me. He told me to go a head and board the plane and if he would look for the missing bag down stairs; If he find it he will send it to my final destination otherwise I will get to claim it at NKC, my final destination. At the arrival I didn’t find the bag and when I tried to report the issue to the head of their office in NKC, he told me- with an aggressive tone to get lost.

Name: Rolla Z
Comments: Where do I start? 1. Planes were from the 1950s old crappy and no wifi. The electricity went out and we had no TVs for like 2 hours and it was a transatlantic flight. The flight from Casablanca to Cairo and back had 0 entertainment. Half the chairs were falling apart and arm rests were breaking. 2. Food was horrible. I flew business and definitely not worth the money. They were stingy with the drinks and snacks. My friends were in economy and one of them got sick. 3. The flight from Cairo to Casablanca had no air conditioning. I was dying and the flight attendant was useless. 5 hours in 85 degrees. 4. Casablanca airport is horrible nobody knows anything about anything. Our gates changed nobody knew. We ran around with 0 help. 5. And don’t get me started about the luggage. If you want to lose your bags for your trip travel Royal air Maroc. Because they are professional luggage losers and not professional finders. We didn’t get our bags to Cairo for a day. It wasn’t the airlines that found them but actually a private company hired by the Cairo airport that helped us. On the way back home we have not received one of our bags. I’ll get to that in #6. 6. Customer service is garbage and there is no other way to put it. We call everyday and nobody helps us we make claims and complaints with 0 help. 6 days no luggage and all they tell us is we can send an urgent email to the luggage department. But 5 days and still nothing….super urgent. You can’t talk to a manger. you can’t talk to a supervisor. You can’t get ahold of the “luggage department” yourself. And they leave you helpless. Save yourself run clear of this company. #donotflyroyalairmaroc

Name: Clare N
Comments: Appalling communication when flight was delayed. We were unable to catch the flight because of incorrect information give to us when at the gate and on time by Royal Maroc Air staff. I tried to raise this with Royal Air maroc via phone, email and their website multiple times. They did not even respond.

Name: Toluwase O
Comments: Flight was terrible, was delayed by an hour from Lagos to Casablanca and then the connecting flight from Casablanca was delayed for over 3 hours without any explanation. Even the attendants at the Casablanca Airport were there laughing and making fun of us.

Name: Blessing D
Comments: Three hours of delay at cassablanxa, missed connecting flight to Scotland. I was stranded at the airport all night due to their fault. No compensation no help. This is my 3rd day of Arrival…. My 23kg luggage is yet to be recovered. Poor!!!

Name: Mackenzie C
Comments: I wanted to write this to help those who feel anxiety over how bad this airline’s reviews are - I truly had SUCH a nice experience with them. Our Norse Airways flight from JFK > Paris got cancelled just a few hours before check in, and we scrambled to find a new flight and Royal Air Morac was the only option with a layover in Casablanca. If you’re traveling light (we all only had a personal item/carry on) you have nothing to worry about. Nothing was weighed or questioned, the staff was actually some of the nicest I’ve had on an airline, BOTH flights took off at the time they were supposed to to a TEE, the meals were on the better side of airline food we’ve had, and the entertainment selection on the longer leg was updated with a lot of options. All in all, a pretty incredible experience after the major issues we had to overcome. I’d definitely fly them again.

Name: Sharon O
Comments: No form of communication despite all the delays. This trip has been so frustrating because of this airline. Everytime I called the customer service, they’d say they don’t know and they have no sort of contact for me to reach out to.

Name: Nounou Z
Comments: OMG Food was tasteless and sandwiches and muffins were frozen my luggage was dammaged and the zipper was opened and i lost 1 shoe and a toiletry bag the people loading and unloading the bags are reaLLY SAVAGES

Name: Femy P
Comments: Very bad experience ineffective service no good communication my bag was lost and nobody communicated and no compensation payed since April

Name: Kenza2012
Comments: RAM has usual did not disappoint. Atrocious customer service as has become expected. On flight No AT802 Casablanca-LDN Gatwick. At the final passport and visa check the employee decided that I needed to show her my visa for the U.K. (Bahrein special passport holder) with a photograph . I showed her a printout receipt of my ETA stating my UK visa number was linked to my passport and that I needed my passport only to enter the U.K. Either she could not read English or she did not understand what she read. After a 20 minutes wait she changed her mind and we were allowed to board the bus. Not a sorry or a word of apology.

Name: key
Comments: I had one of the worst travel experiences with Royal Air Maroc on June 29th. My flight was scheduled for 8:00 PM. At 6:00 PM — while already in the boarding area — we were informed of a delay until 10:30 PM. When 10:30 PM came, there was no update, no information, nothing on the screens, and no staff to talk to. Around 11:10 PM, we were put on a bus in extreme heat, without air conditioning, and left there for about 15 minutes. Once onboard the plane, the situation was the same: no air circulation and more unbearable heat while we waited another 15–20 minutes before taking off at midnight. When we arrived in Guelmim, the plane couldn't land due to heavy fog. The situation became frightening. We were taken all the way back to Casablanca. Once there, they made us wait in the boarding area again, completely exhausted, with no one from RAM to talk to and no hotel or accommodation provided — just a vague, repeated statement: “You have to wait.” We also asked for an official document stating that the airline was responsible for the delay — and, unsurprisingly, we were given nothing at all. I finally decided I couldn’t take it anymore and asked to leave and get my luggage. Based on a previous bad experience, I knew this would be complicated. I had once waited 4 hours for a bag they refused to give me because the flight hadn’t taken off yet. Eventually, I was told by two RAM staff members that my luggage would be sent to belt 2. When I got there — nothing. After 10 more minutes, a staff member told us we were now registered for the 9:00 AM flight and could no longer retrieve our bags. Just like that, same old story, same chaos, same lack of accountability. This airline is completely disorganized. There’s no clear communication, no support, no documentation, and no respect for passengers. A truly disappointing experience.

Name: Mounir M
Comments: It was 37 degrees in casablanca and no air conditioning nor ventilation on. No information provided nor acknowledgement of the conditions on the ground. The pilot stopped and restarted the engines many times and while on the ground people almost collapsed. This is unacceptable for nowadays travelling conditions and if you could avoid travelling with Royal Air Maroc, please do at all price, personally I will reroute via Paris or another European capital and a serious airline company even a low cost one.

Name: robinpiegeler
Comments: I had a flight booked direct tangier to London, the airline a week before changed my flight from 3 hours to 9 hours with a 6 hour stopover, they declined the refund, offered no vouchers and have been so unhelpful, do not fly with this airline unless you are willing to triple your travel time

Name: Victoria C
Comments: Could you consider including vegetarian meals? For the rest all perfect. No big delays and nice treat from the crew. I’d recommend

Name: TC
Comments: I’ve seen reviews about lost baggage and delayed connections, but no one really talks about how this airline exploits you when it comes to seat selection — especially if you’re traveling with kids. I booked my trip to Casablanca on the American Airlines website because it was $200 cheaper than booking directly through Royal Air Maroc. I was traveling with my two kids, so the total savings came to $600. Sounds great, right? Since I booked through AA, I was told I couldn’t select seats until check-in. Fine, I waited for the email to check in. When I did, I discovered they had seated me and my daughters at the very back of the plane. There were plenty of better seats open, so I clicked “Change Seats.” It let me change my seat for free. Then I tried to change my older daughter’s seat — suddenly there’s a $5 charge. Annoying, but okay. When I tried to change the third seat for my 4-year-old, it jumped to $50! That felt absurd. I tried to cancel the seat changes and start over — but nope. I got a message saying I couldn’t go back and could only move forward with payment. I even closed the browser and reopened it, only to be greeted with a new message: “To get your boarding pass, you must finish paying for your new seats.” So I was stuck. Pay $55, or risk having my 4-year-old seated randomly on a long-haul flight. I had no choice. I don’t mind paying for seats — but this was manipulation: 1. No price transparency before selecting seats. Every other airline shows seat prices before you pick. 2. They baited me into a corner, knowing I wouldn’t want my children seated alone. Maybe I should’ve cleared my cookies. Maybe I could’ve fought at the counter. But the process was shady and stressful — especially for a parent just trying to get decent seats

Name: GoPlaces59420354377
Comments: Terrible Airline. Very disorganized, very unprofessional. They do not let you take on a carry on even though they promise you too. Customer service is terrible, no manager. Much better airlines to use. They are rude, disorganized and overpriced! Seats are small, again only 1 carry on and no overhead space. Do Not Fly Royal Air Maroc!! You are welcome!

Name: Adeola A
Comments: My experience was very bad. We go to Morocco and we were told there’s no room for us to sleep that we should sit down in the lounge over 12 hours. That’s not fair we paid huge amount. the flight. And take us to Morocco and they ignored us which is not fair on people we pay huge amount so did Johnny begin again we were here sitting down we can’t sleep. We can’t do anything. This is not fair. Thank you. I have a worst experience with airmorocco

Name: Unknown U
Comments: I once read a review like this and assumed this could not be me and i gave it the benefit of the doubt. If you're planning on using Royal Air Maroc, don't do it. I had the ultimate worst experience. The staff offered the worst customer service from the moment of checking in. When I taught it would be better on arrival, things got worst. The professionalism and customer service was absurd. I traveled from Toronto with my 2 children. On arrival at Casablanca I kept asking for directions at I felt like no one understood. I was told by staff at the airport "this is not canada, its a different system here and theyll call the police". It was frustrating, I was given the run around until I completed missed the flight, was screamed at, was stuck in maroc for longer than expected (accomodations/expense fees i had to cover on my own) and my baggage was delayed and one lost. While I was in casablanca with my 2 kids, I visited the airport for 3 days straight in search on my baggage with the customer service. One of my baggage was still missing. I notified Air Moroc via email and in person that I will be leaving Casablanca and I need to know what steps i should take. They reassured me that my baggage will follow the location i will be at next. I still sent emails and used the online tracking system which is not working properly. Few days later, I got back to the airport to prepare for my flight to toronto from casablanca. And again I got reassured that the bag is in transit to toronto from casablanca and one of their rude staff told me i shouldnt worry about it. I asked to speak to someone else and spoke to 3 other staff about my issue and they sent me back to that particular rude staff. On arrival to toronto that very day no baggage and the tag information is not found in the system.

Name: Joyce M
Comments: Absolute terrible experience with them. Had to travel quick for a funeral and they made the journey to and from a nightmare. Delayed flights causing us to miss our connecting flights (This seems like the norm for them). Rude and unhelpful staff. Blaming customers for missing flights even though they arrived late. Wanting customers to pay for another flight (extortion). Missing luggage and no explanation or insight on how i would get my belongings. But the last straw was my luggage was to be delivered and the delivery man said no one was home and unable to deliver even though I was waiting all day for it. This would be my last flight with them. If i can give zero stars I would

Name: S_JT_2320
Comments: Our journey had 2 sectors. The planes were oldish but took off and landed at the scheduled time. One of our items of baggage didn't make it to Marseille but it was delivered to our hotel within 36hrs. So on balance an OK experience and yes I would use them again.

Name: Youssef M
Comments: If I can give less than one star, I would. No consideration. 9h delay in my my way to Morocco and the same in my way back without letting you know and the add thing is that you have to check on time to wait for more than 11 hours to depart. Last time I’m flying with la RAM

Name: Ahed M
Comments: It’s the worst airline to fly with. Our original flight was from Dulles International Airport but our flight time kept changing and its was getting us to our destination much later than we intended. Customs service was at worst, they even attempted to scam us to pay again for our tickets. Then to find out that our card was compromised. They finally agreed to change our flight to fly from New York instead of Washington. We had to pay for our own transportation to New York so we can arrive to Paris on the 15th as we planed not the 16th as the airline intended to fly us. On the plane business class was very disappointing, service was very bad, the flight attendant was the most rude person I ever met. No blankets, baby pillows, seats are very uncomfortable, for of served cold.

Name: pjn5
Comments: Since Gambia Experience, in a moment of insanity, decided to stop direct flights from England to The Gambia from May to Oct, I had to find an alternative. The 2 flight choice with RAM seemed to be the best option and the price wasn't bad. Plane condition was adequate for 2 x 3.5 hour flights , in flight staff were fairly friendly and food was OK. Flight arrived on time with the usual wait for my suitcase which arrived broken. My sons travelled 2 weeks later and had an unforgettable experience....racist behaviour from staff and then RAM lost 2 of their suitcases. The cases finally arrived 4 days late, after we had driven to the airport every night to check (RAM do not contact you and do not apologise). We saw cases lost every night we were there... Conclusion. As Gambia Experience can't be bothered flying there all year round., RAM is a cheaper reasonable alternative. But do not expect friendly staff and do NOT check in luggage

Name: Michael M
Comments: DO NOT FLY ROYAL AIR MAROC!! THEY ARE A LYING AND DECEPTIVE AIRLINE! I purchased two RT tickets from Miami-Madrid, connecting through Casablanca, for my daughter and I as part of a 9 day tour package. 12 hours before we were to depart Miami, the airline notified us that our flight to Casablanca was going to be delayed by 7 hours. This would have caused to us to miss the entire first day of our tour, which was totally unacceptable. I was finally forced to purchase round trip tickets ($2800) Miami/Madrid out of my pocket after Royal Maroc was unable to get us on a different flight that would have arrived on time in Madrid to make our tour. I requested a full refund ($2800) and after several months of back and forth, they agreed IN WRTING IN AN EMAIL to give me a full refund. That was 90 days ago and still have not received the refund. Additionally, they have now resorted to ghosting me with no replies to the countless emails I have sent asking when I can expect the refund. Royal Air Maroc is an ethically and morally bankrupt company. DO NOT GIVE YOUR HARD EARNED MONEY TO THIS SHAM ORGANIZATION!

Name: Mohamed E
Comments: Fly with Royal Air Maroc if you like to pay more and get a worse service. Be prepared for major delays and no customer service.

Name: Mbo K
Comments: I recently had the opportunity to fly with Royal Air Maroc ( from Toronto to Paris via Casablanca TA 210/ returned from Paris to Toronto via Casablanca TA 211)- the experience offered sharp contrasts depending on the aircraft and location. The Good: The Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner stands out as Royal Air Maroc’s best offering. I flew from Toronto in Business Class (also referred to as First Class and the comfort, seat design, and onboard service met international standards. The cabin was modern, the service attentive, and the flight experience overall was descent. If you are considering flying Royal Air Maroc long haul, make sure it’s on a 787-9—it makes all the difference. The Not-So-Good: Unfortunately, the 787-8 aircraft is noticeably dated in comparison. The layout and experience are underwhelming, especially for business travelers who expect consistency in premium service. Those familiar with the airline tend to avoid the 787-8 format, and I now understand why. The Major Concern: Ground Experience in Morocco The Casablanca airport is a major weak point. The VIP Lounge was substandard, with unpleasant odors, minimal food (mostly questionable mini sandwiches), and no atmosphere of premium service. We left the lounge because it simply wasn’t acceptable. There’s no proper Business Class lane at check-in, and the transport vans to the aircraft—especially for premium customers—are outdated, without air conditioning, and not fit for a flagship carrier experience. If anything, you’re better off being the last to board to avoid that discomfort. The customer service at Casablanca airport is a glaring issue—there’s no sense of priority, no warmth, and no efficiency. My short-haul business class flight from Casablanca to Paris (2 hours) was not worth the upgrade. The experience felt economy-class at best. Final Thoughts: I wouldn’t write off Royal Air Maroc entirely. The 787-9 long-haul service is a step in the right direction and shows promise. I also noticed that Emirates is building a presence in Casablanca, which may push Royal Air Maroc to improve. Perhaps they are in a growth transition—but if they want to compete globally, they must step up ground services, consistency, and premium experience across all routes and aircraft/ food was okay one meal on 7 hours fly and cold salad 6 hours later- maybe they expect you to sleep for 8 hours. Until then, I will avoid long layovers in Casablanca and any Royal Air Maroc aircraft that is not the 787-9.

Name: Ebelechi I
Comments: My luggage was missing till date, customer service is very poor, poor communication and language bno customer service arrier,,My flight was delayed by one hour 30 minutes,in Lagos and is a conneccting flight,then getting to Casablanca,we missed the connecting, we're asked to pay, for something that is not our fault,reaching to London,one of my bag was missing,my bag even arrived before me.i regret flying with Royal air Marco,the stress is too much,the losss is undescribable.

Name: Jazzy J
Comments: If you value your sanity never fly with Worst airline ever. Terrible customer service, Delayed flights Lost baggage. I hope someone from the BBC investigates this horrible airline and brings it to stop all operations. An airline like this should never be in operation. I am owed compensation money for a delayed flight and they are still yet to pay or investigate my lost baggage which carries (by law) more compensation. It has been 4 months now and i am still yet to see anything. Whenever i leave a message i get the same response

Name: S M
Comments: My luggage never showed up; it was presumed lost. This happened to approximately 80% of the passengers on my flight; it was chaos at the arrivals area. The flight was a nightmare, the seats were cramped, the toilet did not flush (the smells from the back of the plane were eye-watering)....I could go on. I had to purchase new clothes at a significant cost, since they did not bring my bags.

Name: B B
Comments: TV/Films system did not work during an 8 hour flight. I complained to 2 attendants 30 mins after we got in the planes. They never do anything to solve the problem. I had to complain again to a 3rd attendant lady. She apologized but never solved the problem. The attendants are arrogant. They need training outside Morocco to learn about the real customer service. What a shame that RAM charges a lot and provides such a bad service.

Name: T A
Comments: Travelled to Marrakesh in high spirits with my wife, for our very first holiday together abroad. And to say that the experience of flying with Royal Air Maroc has soured that experience somewhat would be an understatement. From delays, to poor customer service and an early check in system that exists for nothing the list of complaints are almost endless. Our flight to Marrakech had a layover for an hour in Casablanca, it was supposed to be a quick genuinely stress free transfer turned in to the complete opposite. Not only was the flight delayed here when we arrived at the gate for unspecified reasons, there was no apologies issued for the delay in flight. After landing in Casablanca over an hour late we had to run through the terminal like maniacs to catch our connecting flight to Marrakesh. Our return connecting flight from Marrakesh to Casablanca was also delayed, once again no reason was given for the delay, in fact they did not even bother telling us the flight was delayed, the staff at the gates seemed unbothered like this was a common occurance. No apology was given. The online check in is a total waste of time, I checked in online soon as it opened and on the return flight it did not allow me to select seats. When I asked at the airport to ensure that mine and my wifes seats were together, the member of staff checking us in said they would however when I was handed the boarding pass I noticed that we were given completely different seats and rows, my wifes was 5 rows away. When I raised this with the staff member they simply said they could not do anything about it and dismissed us rudely. In general the customer service from Royal Air Maroc members was poor, they seemed like they did not want to be there. I would not recommend Royal Air Maroc to my worst enemy.

Name: Fumilayo T
Comments: I AND MY FAMILY DIDN'T GET OUR LODGES AND BAGS SINCE WE RETURNED TO NIGERIA ON THE 29TH OF MAY TILL DATE, SO WE ARE NOT HAPPY ABOUT THE SITUATION. SO WE DONT NO WHAT IS HAPPENING NOW. I REGREAT OF FLYING RAYEN AIR MAROC AND I CAN NEVER FLY THIS AIR LINE AGAIN AND AGAIN. THANKS

Name: Jess
Comments: DO NOT fly with Air Royal Moroc unless you want to have your travel plans thrown into oblivion! We had our flight booked 8 months in advance with the route of Barcelona to Miami with a day layover in Casablanca (Morocco). We booked a lovely hotel, airport transport and a trip in Casablanca and everything in Miami for the airline to notify us 1 DAY BEFORE that they had cancelled our flight from Casablanca to Miami. Their marvellous solution was to put us on another flight more than 20h after the original flight without any intention of covering the cost of another night in the hotel. We suggested another flight option that would have got us into Miami earlier but they refused. The customer service was awful, useless and the policies are inhumane. Maybe the airline would be okay for short haul but I HIGHLY RECOMMEND you go elsewhere to save you from this type of predicament. Highly disappointing Air Royal Moroc, do better!

Name: Bart De Backer
Comments: Worst flight I’ve ever experienced. Got boarded 10 minutes late. Then we stayed in the plane on the remote tarmac for over 1h20 minutes due to ‘additionele technical controle that were needed’. The plane was hardly airconditioned (33 Celsius inside) and people were suggering from the heat. Some people were getting sick. There were also babies on board… you can imagine the chaos. In the end water was distributed to the passengers by the crew. We were hardly informed about when the plane would take off. The seats were worn out and the Windows really dirty… It is really sub-standard. Once airborne, there was no choice of food (i was seated at row 27 of 31 or 32 rows of a B737-800). The fish was horrible and there were only begravend, no rice or potato. I asked for a diet coke, also not available anymore 35 minutes into the flight ! Really a nightmare this flight. Will never Fly Royal Air Marco again ! It is sub-standard and not worth your money.

Name: Maps57886209199
Comments: We were flying from BCN to IAD with a layover at CMN. Honestly, the seats weren’t terribly uncomfortable in the Boeing 737-800 or Boeing 787-8. We also had plenty of legroom, which was nice. The cabin of their 737-800, however, had barely any AC, during the boarding and taxiing process, so it felt like a sweat box until we reached cruising altitude. Our second flight was delayed, so a 1 hour layover became an 8 hour layover and we did not fancy CMN’s airport at all. As we got on the jet bridge, we had to evacuate it and go back to the terminal, because of some issue with the plane. While I was sleeping on the flight from CMN to IAD, either a flight attendant or another passenger stole my blanket (not the airline’s provided blanket, but my own personal property) and the flight attendants offered me no assistance. They wouldn’t even come to me when I pressed the call button! So, make sure to tuck away *ANY* personal belongings that you don’t want taken and understand that the flight attendants will be mostly inattentive to you, unless you vomit. The food wasn’t bad, but wasn’t good, either. We chose chicken, but fish was offered, as well, and it was okay, but definitely not the best airline cuisine. Honestly, I’m just glad we got back to the US in one piece.

Name: Andre
Comments: Like 99% of the people before me, I write this review to warn others about the atrocious service this airline provides. My experience was: On the way back to Lisbon from Casablanca, me and five other people were selected to stay aside, before you enter the plane, humiliated, with the explanation that there was a problem with one seat in our row. One hour standing, being rudely treated by staff. It was only when one of us demanded to enter that we were allowed in, only to find out the seats were already taken by other passengers. The crew reaction was unbelievable, one even told us we were lucky they let us in the airplane, I'm still speechless a month later. I was finally seated after a crew member told me " you can seat there or you can stand " I was offered no beverage or food during the flight. Note - I was at no time rude to anyone. I absolutely love Morocco. Next time I'd rather swim there than using this sorry excuse of an airline.

Name: Cenina S
Comments: Despite flying business class, my experience with Royal Air Maroc was deeply disappointing from start to finish. The boarding process was chaotic and poorly managed—it took over 30 minutes to board, with no clear priority for premium passengers. Once on board, one flight attendant was particularly rude, going so far as to challenge my use of the restroom at the end of the flight, despite having interacted with me multiple times and knowing I was seated in business class. As for the food, it was lackluster at best. The seats were uncomfortable and not what I expected at all! The most frustrating part came after landing: my luggage was lost, and the representative in Casablanca showed little interest in helping. Their attitude was dismissive and unprofessional. Reaching customer service for an update was almost impossible—when someone did finally call me back, I had to repeat all of the information from my original claim, only to be told there were no updates. If I could give this airline a -100, I would. For an international carrier, this level of service is unacceptable. I sincerely hope they address these operational and customer service failures.

Name: Z i
Comments: Came here to give a bad review about a canceled flight without reumbecment or atleast giving back hotel fees that we had to pay. But it is already bad with 2 stars, I wish I saw these reviews before booking. And they hold monopoly on flights in morocco which is even worst, since you dont have other options.

Name: Ahmed C
Comments: Upon arriving to Freetown I didn’t get my luggage for a period of 12 days. One of my luggage was damaged and no compensation was paid. And the staff at the Wilkinson road office were rude and unwilling to help me fill out the delay baggage claim. Coming back from Freetown I was kept at the Casablanca airport for 8 hrs with no accommodation. The airline offered me a burger which made me sick at the airport. I still have photos of left over burger. I will never fly with Royal air Maroc , it is disgusting.

Name: MHR
Comments: Atrocious airline. Experienced a nearly 15 hour delay on a flight from DC to Casablanca - never even an apology. The staff--if you can call them that--sat some cans of pepsi out on the desk and that was all that was provided. Hardly any communication. Service on board was equally awful. The airline should not be a member of the One World alliance as it cannot meet even basic standards of service. Truly awful.

Name: Resort62514295257
Comments: My airticket was initially modifiable with fees, I modified it the first time with fees. Again, I couldn't travel this time in May 2025, so I tried to change it online, but it was impossible, I completed the form request online, they just sent me the customer phone number in Morocco, I answered them by email that I can not call this international number, no answer. Today, I contacted one agency RAM here in Dubai, they confirmed me that the airticket can not be modified. So I lost this ticket and my money. Terrible customer service, I will not buy again any airticket with them.. It's unacceptable and unprofessional..👎👎👎👎

Name: Loretta E
Comments: The worst airline ever. It’s one week since I arrived and I still haven’t gotten my luggage. They left it in Casablanca. The most inefficient customer service also. I would never recommend

Name: mokj357
Comments: I had a terrible experience during my overnight transit in Paris before my flight back to my home country. Check in agent The check-in agent failed to inform me that my baggage would be sent directly to home country . I only realized this when I was boarding. The staff at the boarding gate ( the staff) I needed to retrieve my luggage in Paris to access some medicine, but when I asked for assistance from the ground staff, they suggested I buy a new ticket instead of helping me. She also walked away when I beg for help and feel very frustrated. Additionally, the airline staff refused to provide her name for my records for making a complaint and hid her staff card. She insisted and repeated * say No * and it is the customer’s fault. The inflight service I told supervisor of my case. He is the most helpful staff and tried to seek the help from CDG’s staff. Complaint form I submitted a complaint form and file a email complaint with no response.

Name: Chijioke A
Comments: I travelled with Royal Air Maroc from London Gatwick via Casablanca to Abuja international on the 29/30th of April respectively. I arrived at my final destination only to realize that my is missing, one week later, still haven’t got my bag. Called the customer care folks severally but they keep playing me around.. one was very rude while another said to me “ sir we have rush hour now, is there anything else I can do for you “ I don’t live in Abuja and what’s meant to be a fun trip is turning into a nightmare as I have to start buying clothes. They don’t know where my bag is and are unwilling to help. I’ve contacted the MP for my constituency to write a letter to the CEO, I’ve written to the Ambassador of Morocco to the UK and I’m prepared to take this as high up as I can in a bid to hold them accountable for the horrible way they treat their passengers. My advice : STAY AWAY FROM ROYAL AIR MAROC!

Name: Kathern H
Comments: This is not the first time we have had issues with RAM, but it seems to some how just keep getting worse. Agents not able to do anything and the department you need doesn't work the hours you call, so they tell you to call in the morning. We wanted to change a flight on this occasion. They sent a link, we paid it, put 2 pending charges on the bank account. App showed confirmation with the new price, but the outbound flight was missing from the ticket. Agents and supervisors were not able to do anything. When we called at the time the correct department would be in, they said they reversed the payment for the change and now it's an additional $117.00. Spent too much time going back and forth with them about we did what we needed to do and it was their error and they would do absolutely nothing. Disconnected with them to discuss what is the best option for many reasons. We were waiting for a new link to pay the new price, it didn't come so we called back. Now, when we call back, another error on their behalf and the price once again went up. In 2 days, and about 15 calls we decided to cancel the entire booking and take the loss with cancelation fees. The first agent we spoke to about cancelations gave us a price, second agent in the morning gave another proce and now this agent gave us a price nearly double. We canceled. We had a major issue with them when flying out of Casablanca last year, and additional flights prior, it is always about RAM not following their written policies, not having consistency, having unbelievably rude customer service agents, not owning their errors that they can clearly see in their system, and what seems like random made up amounts based on how they feel and want to choose knowing even though it is their error they will not correct. It is worth it to take a flight with another airline and have 3 stops over booking with RAM that is blatantly corrupt. I want to know when the FAA or DOT is going to step in and fix this or stop them from flying in and out of the US.

Name: Desmond Cuddy
Comments: We recently returned from spain via Casablanca airport to toronto-------my son left, by mistake, his new Iphone 16 in a seatback as he was leaving the airplane------when he realized he'd left it in the plane we were on our way to the terminal via a shuttle bus---we were not allowed to return to retrive it and when we contacted the ground staff at the help desk they were totally dis-interested and not one bit willing to help!!!! My son sent in a complaint to the Air Maroc customer service -----he knew exactly where the phone was via tracking ----it was at the help desk---but still no assistance from the ground staff. After numerous requests directed to the customer service staff we have not received any assistance from them!!!!!!

Name: Isaac D
Comments: I flew Royal Air Maroc in June 2024, and it has been one of the worst airline experiences I’ve ever had. During my trip, my baggage was both missing and damaged, and I filed a claim immediately in June. Today is April 28, 2025 — nearly 11 months later — and there is still no resolution. Since filing the claim, I have reached out to Royal Air Maroc’s customer service countless times. Every time, I have been met with either silence, empty promises, or blatant runarounds. The last email I received from them was back in November 2024, where they asked me for documents I had already sent months earlier. I responded immediately, yet heard nothing since. Every time I call and request a supervisor, I am either: Told no supervisor is available. Told the supervisor only speaks French. Transferred to another regular employee pretending to be a supervisor. When I finally managed to speak to someone claiming to be a supervisor, they were incredibly rude and unprofessional — which sadly has been the norm with their staff throughout this process. It’s clear their customer service department has no genuine desire to help; they seem to deliberately stall cases until customers eventually give up. Adding to the dishonesty: Last year, after months of frustration, I left a detailed review on TripAdvisor and Facebook. Not long after posting, someone who seemed to be a Royal Air Maroc employee reached out, apologizing and expressing regret over how long it was taking to resolve my case. They asked me for my claim information and my contact details, which I immediately provided. However, they never followed up. A few weeks later, when I checked back, I noticed that my review had been removed — and attempts to contact that employee again were completely ignored. It became clear to me that this is part of a larger tactic they use: they pretend to show concern just to get negative reviews taken down, then ghost you afterward. Bottom line: If you are considering flying with Royal Air Maroc, think twice. If anything goes wrong — especially with baggage — you will be on your own, dealing with one of the worst customer service teams I’ve ever encountered. They have poor communication skills, little to no accountability, and it feels like a deliberate strategy to wear customers down until they quit fighting for a resolution. I refuse to give up — I will continue to follow up weekly until this case is resolved. But sadly, I have zero faith in Royal Air Maroc’s ability to treat their customers fairly or professionally.

Name: Tom P
Comments: Could not get a consistent answer from anyone 1. Flight Departure changed 4 times in the two weeks up to departure date 2.) They were supposed to correct a name error on my ticket. This was 4 nailes and 3 phone calls and email a copy of my passport. Correction was never made. 3.) At airport the departure time on my ticket, the departure time on the board and the flight status on the company web site departure time were all different. I called the company again and the said Gate was closing at 930. I rushed to get there at 920 and the gate had not even opened yet. 4.) Seems like everyone I dealt with made up a different set of rules and when I pointed out the inconsistencies some of the agents got impatient. 5.) In the end, Morocco is a beautiful country so don't cheat yourself out of a chance to visit. Just find a different way to get there then Royal air maroc

Name: hmj1986
Comments: NEVER AGAIN. FLIGHT WAS DELAYED OVER 8 HOURS. I SPENT THE NIGHT IN THE AIRPORT BECAUSE THEY MADE US STILL "CHECK IN" ON TIME. 9PM FLIGHT LEFT AT 530AM WITH NO UPDATE AS TO WHY GIVEN. MISSED CONNECTION AND DIDN'T GET TO FINAL DESTINATION UNTIL AFTER 2AM LOCAL TIME. I HAVE CALLED NUMEROUS TIMES, WRITTEN EMAILS, FILLED OUT THEIR COMPLAINT FORM AND NO RESPONSE AT ALL. 3 OUT OF 4 OF OUR FLIGHTS WERE SEVERELY DELAYED WITH ABSOLUTELY NO EXPLANATION WHATSOEVER. AVOID AT ALL COSTS.

Name: maryam s
Comments: Disappointing Business Class Experience – Unacceptable Attitude We flew business class on April 15th, expecting a premium experience—but were shocked by the behavior of one of the air hostesses. She was extremely impolite, bordering on rude, and showed zero professionalism. When we asked for meals for our children, she flatly refused, claiming everything was finished. Upon insisting—given we had paid a significant amount for this service—her response was shockingly inappropriate: “I’ll bring my own food for your children.” That level of sarcasm and dismissiveness is completely unacceptable, especially in a service role. We understand things can run out, but there’s a way to handle it with basic courtesy and empathy. If she no longer enjoys her job, perhaps it’s time she considered a different one—because passengers shouldn’t be paying to deal with such attitude and tantrums. Extremely disappointing experience from what should have been a high-end, customer-focused service.

Name: Salthillhalli
Comments: Trust the all the negative reviews … it’s true…it’s BAD BEYOND BELIEF! This review would be minus stars if possible. We did read the reviews before travelling and thought it can’t be that bad… well it was worse. We had low expectations for RAM but they far exceeded our worst nightmares. Upon booking through American Airlines (more on them later) we really did not have much of a choice for the return from Morocco back to the states as AA partners with RAM. That being said we were initially supposed to fly Casablanca to Miami but a couple of weeks before the trip RAM completely cancelled that leg so we now had to do Casablanca – JFK – MIA. We got to the airport over 3 hours before our flight as we thought there may be issues. We arrived at the check-in counter, gave our last names and passports and were met with an “hmmmmm” followed by “I don’t see your reservation” and “do you have a confirmation number”. Of course we did, told her and then “uh-oh, I still don’t see it, do you have a ticket number?”, obvious stall tactics. I fired up my computer and found the ticket number and then they said “American Airlines never confirmed your ticket”. Really as we have confirmation numbers, ticket numbers and am looking at my AA app as we speak seeing everything online booked and paid for. Then the truth came out “the flight is oversold and we can’t check you in”. They asked us to move away from the desk saying “we will put you on the waitlist” while they checked other people in (locals). We refused; we have a confirmed booking on this flight. While still in line we called AA and spoke to a nice lady (for 50 minutes) who confirmed that we did indeed have seats on this RAM flight but there no options to get us out of Casablanca that day or the next day. They were checking in dozens of other people as we were waiting and on hold with AA. As it turned out there were other guests (mostly flying American Airlines) that had the same issue that we did. Frantic…with my wife and 12-year-old daughter in tears there was no help from anyone at RAM, employees, supervisors and managers, no answers, no options, no help at all. I resorted to looking to book another flight at our own expense which would have flown us from Casablanca to Istanbul, 6-hour layover and then to JFK. Just before I bought these tickets my daughter comes running over to say they got us on the flight, I ran back to the desk to get us checked-in, now 50 minutes before the flight leaves. The agent proceeded to put 2 of our suitcases on the conveyer belt and as I load our third bag our agent gets up mid check-in and walks away! Two bags gone with no bag tracking number, no QR code…nothing, no boarding passes and additional bags still needed to check. Fast forward to arrival in Miami, missing checked bag and took a week to arrive back at our house, this took daily calls and emails. Another agent gave us our boarding passes, now we are 40 minutes before the flight leaves, we ran as fast as we could, had to go through security (had to cut the line) and then passport control, again cut the line. Ran to gate as doors were closing. Made the flight and was then told we were not sitting together, they wanted my 12-year-old daughter to sit on her own between strangers on a flight from Casablanca to New York, needless to say that was not happening. We would not take our seats; flight delayed until a nice gentleman offered to change seats so at least my wife and daughter could sit together, absolutely no help from the flight attendants. I was placed in the middle seat of 5 in the back of the plane, we had 3 seats booked together. They lie, they did have our reservation. They did not honor our seat assignments. They did not honor the checked bag policy for status members. Planes are terrible, old, hot, uncomfortable and food equally bad. Staff are downright rude. Both of us are in the hospitality/travel industry and travel a lot. Never in our lives have we encountered this level of incompetency and absolute disregard for customer needs. Insofar as American Airlines (partner with RAM), they said we booked with RAM so there was nothing they could do. We booked the R/T flights with AA, not directly with Royal Air Maroc. Thanks American Airlines, sure glad I flew over a million miles with you and when I really needed help you left us to fend for ourselves. PLEASE learn from our mistake, DO NOT fly this airline at any cost!

Name: Jigme
Comments: I am writing to express my frustration with the repeated mishandling of my luggage by Air Maroc. This is the third time my luggage has been misplaced. The first two instances occurred during my return trips home, but the most recent incident happened while I was traveling outbound. My bag contained essential clothing, and I was forced to purchase new clothes. The airport and the office at Monrovia have shown a lack of organization. There was no tracking system or tracking number provided for my luggage. It has been over two weeks, and I have yet to receive any follow-up from the airline.

Name: Kae G
Comments: I am writing to express my extreme disappointment and frustration regarding the recent experience my travel companions and I had with Royal Air Maroc. What was supposed to be a pleasant trip turned into an incredibly stressful and disappointing ordeal due to the airline’s mishandling of our baggage and subsequent lack of customer service. We were traveling from Errachidia (AT1447), with a connection in Casablanca (AT924), before arriving at our final destination in Seville, Spain. Upon arrival in Seville, we discovered that two of our large checked bags were missing. These bags contained not only essential clothing and toiletries but also valuable personal belongings and cherished souvenirs that were irreplaceable. We immediately filed a Property Irregularity Report (PIR) at the airport and expected to receive some form of follow-up or assistance. However, despite our repeated attempts to contact Royal Air Maroc, we received absolutely no response for an entire day. This complete lack of communication added to our distress and left us feeling utterly abandoned by the airline. As a result of the lost baggage and silence from your support team, we were forced to spend our entire stay in Seville without any of our personal items, clean clothes, or travel essentials. What was meant to be a memorable trip was overshadowed by inconvenience, discomfort, and unnecessary stress — all due to your airline’s negligence. This experience is unacceptable. We demand an immediate investigation into the whereabouts of our luggage, a formal apology, and full compensation for the inconvenience and loss we’ve suffered. We trusted Royal Air Maroc with our belongings, and that trust has been thoroughly broken. I sincerely hope this complaint will be taken seriously, and that action will be taken to resolve this matter promptly.

Name: Yannick B
Comments: Worst customer service i have ever seen. I missed my flight because information on website was wrong. Wanted to fly with my bicycle and they wanted to charge me over 275$ cad for it, while its listed at 150cad$ on the website. It not possible to pay online and since my credit card was deactivated i missed my flight. Nobody tries to help you, they all stare at you with no sense of sympathy. Worst airline, worst customer service i have ever seen

Name: Mehryar E
Comments: My flight was scheduled for 9:00 PM. Got an email that it is delayed to 12:00 am. Get another email that it is delayed to 4:30 am. I have tour reservation in Casablanca and am going to miss it. They cannot tell me what is wrong.

Name: Saidat L
Comments: I recently had a terrible experience with Royal Air Maroc. I had a 12-hour layover in Casablanca on my way home, and before my flight, the airline was contacted to inquire about hotel accommodations for long layovers. They assured that they provided such accommodations, for layovers of 8 hours and above, so I canceled my outside hotel booking based on this information. First of all, the state of the plane was deplorable. The plane was extremely dirty. The meal tray was filthy, and I had to use wet tissues to clean both my seat and the tray. When i arrived at the airport, I asked multiple airline officials about the promised hotel accommodation, but they were rude and claimed no such service was offered. Instead, they directed me to the Oasis Lounge, which was overcrowded and poorly maintained. There were not enough seats, people were standing, and I couldn’t even use the restroom without risking losing my seat. Passengers were even SLEEPING ON THE FLOOR. The airline provided no food, water, or comfort during this long layover. Despite my efforts to get assistance, including having my family reach out to customer care via phone and email, no one was helpful or responsive. It was a terrible experience from start to finish. I would never fly with Royal Air Maroc again and strongly advise others to avoid this airline as well.

Name: ErnRam
Comments: We transited arriving from a Turkish Airlines Istanbul business class flight, to a RAM flight via Laayoune to Gran Canaria. 1. Our luggage was mislaid for 48 hours at Casablanca Airport 2. The inflight staff of RAM flatly refused to speak English. no announcements were made in English 3. Further they never informed us that we were required to exit the flight at Laayoune and re board, and for that the head inflight attendant chose to scream at us For the future RAM should advise ALL ENGLISH speaking clients at the time of making a booking with their airline that they only offer services in their vernacular.
O/D: Casablanca - Las Palmas de Gran Canaria

Name: Imane E
Comments: Flight was 8hours delayed without an early notice , bad customer service and the food made me feel sick .this is so frustrating

Name: Venture42804972830
Comments: I am Moroccan, and I will never book with this airline again in my life. This airline is an embarrassment to our country. High prices for absolutely abhorrent customer service, garbage policies, and rude airport staff. I love my country but we our customer service is T-R-A-S-H and Royal Air Maroc is at the bottom of the barrel. If you call with any issue, big or small, they are not helpful. They are rude, dismissive, and I think the entire world should boycott them. That's the only way they'll ever improve. Royal Air Maroc gives Morocco and Moroccans a bad reputation, and this is coming from someone that is Moroccan. Avoid at all costs, unless you want a headache and horrible flying experience. Their planes are often not properly cleaned, with a weird smell as well. Don't waste your money on business class, because the business class experience on Royal Air Maroc is nothing like business class with other airlines..you might as well fly economy. Food is gross, air staff is rude, customer service phone staff is a nightmare, and even the people on the ground at the airport are rude. It's like being rude and dismissive and lazy are qualities required to work for this airline. Absolutely disgusting and shameful. They will never see another penny from me or my large extended family of 14 people who fly from Canada/US to Morocco several times a year. Shame on them! Take it from a Moroccan...please spend a little extra and fly with another airline, I promise you it's worth it. They don't deserve a penny from anyone. Garbage airline, garbage service. Scammers, money grubbers, horrible.

Name: Lia M
Comments: I booked a more expensive ticket because I needed the option of changing it. I had some uncertainties with work and needed the extra flexibility. Unfortunately, when I called to change my return flight, the airline asked for an extra $334. They said they were going to email me a link to pay this extra fee but the link never arrived. I called back asking for the link to be resent and their said they cancelled the request and I now have no return flight. They then did the whole thing again but now to change would cost $447. I said I wanted to talk to a manager and they hung up the call. I called back again and again and each time I asked to talk to a manager the call dropped. Finally, I got through but now they said that because it's Ramadan I need to call back after the holiday. I did that, and now the price to change was $580. Each of the 11 times I called I landed on a customer service agent that was dismissive, rude, short, and kept interrupting me to blame me for their system's failure. An absolute abhorrent experience. Would never book with this airline again.

Name: Christopher F
Comments: Easily the worst, most disorganized, outdated, poorly run airline I’ve ever been on. Read the reviews-they’re accurate-it truely is a terrible experience. From the chaos of check in, to seats that we paid for and never received, to steaming hot bus rides to board the plane, horrendous food, poor service, bathrooms that are locked until cruising altitude, dirty cabin and seats, surely flight attendants, it goes on and on. AVOID this airline at all cost!!

Name: Parthik M
Comments: Worst Flight Ever. They cancelled the flight anytime. Do not take this flight ever, they don't respond in timely manner as well. For my refund, I'm trying to reach out to them from last 20 days, they keep delaying and don't give nay accurate answer.

Name: BKOttawa
Comments: WOW food service on a short flight. Unheard of. This was a surprise. Sorry we ate at the airport. They should have informed us. No inflight entertainment. Gotta lets us know this stuff too . Bathroom was dirty as usual for any airline. (does any airline have clean bathrooms ??) let me know - Only issue we had was flight was changed to an hour earlier which threw off our sightseeing since we were in Casablanca for just 1 night. OH well no big deal it was raining anyway. Just please please airlines stop all the over head luggage. It's driving me nuts watching people fight for space which is not theirs to even take. It should cost more to take carry on over head luggage than to put it under the place. This must be unsafe. Not sure why this airline gets a bad rap. If we had known how good it was for the price we would have flown internally in Morocco and stayed a lot longer. NEXT TIME FOR SURE!

Name: Pavellj
Comments: We had 3 flights, 2 from Toronto and one return flight. One the first flight, they lost our luggage for 24 hours. On the next flght, they were delayed 10 hours. On the final flight, they were delayed 24 hours. RAM deserves the terrible rating.

Name: John I
Comments: The flight from Lagos to London via Casablanca was the worst flight I've ever been on. The flight was delayed for 80 minutes with no explanation from the captain or officials. The air hostesses were rude while boarding and during the flight. The aircraft was rickety and reeks of foul smell. Will not recommend and will definitely not be flying agin with them.

Name: Journey12929327315
Comments: We flew from São Paulo (Brazil) to Barcelona (Spain) with a layover in Casablanca (Moroco). The intercontinental flight was very good (modern plane, good food with 2 full meals). The flight from Casablanca to Barcelona was also more than fine (comfortable seat and snack on the way). Despite lot of negative reviews we decided to go with them and were very pleased with the experience

Name: Tucker g
Comments: The Worst Airline Experience of My Life – Avoid at All Costs I have flown with many airlines, but this was, without a doubt, the absolute worst travel experience I have ever had. If I could give them negative stars, I would. This airline should not be in business. They are disorganized, incompetent, and utterly incapable of providing even the most basic level of customer service. I paid $2,500 for a business class ticket, expecting at least a decent long-haul experience. What I got instead was a dirty, cramped, and uncomfortable business class seat in a 2-2-2 configuration, where I had to share foot space with another passenger. To make things worse, one of the seats was uneven when laid flat, meaning sleeping was nearly impossible. How is this considered business class? But the real disaster happened during my layover in Casablanca. We had a tight connection, and upon arrival, there was no clear signage, no information on departure times, and absolutely no communication from the airline. We asked multiple airport staff, including the help desk, security officers, and even the police, and every single one of them told us the wrong information. They claimed our flight had already left an hour earlier, forcing us to panic and attempt to rebook. In the midst of this chaos, a random non English speaking stranger (more helpful than the entire airport staff) pointed us in the right direction. We sprinted to the correct gate and barely made the flight. If we had followed what the airport employees told us, we would have been stranded with no options. That level of incompetence is unacceptable. For the return flight, the nightmare continued. Our gate changed four times within the final hour and a half before departure, creating unnecessary confusion and stress. When we finally landed in JFK, they lost my checked baggage. No apologies, no help, just more frustration. This airline is an absolute joke. Disorganized, misleading, and completely unreliable. I wouldn't fly with them again if they paid me. If you're considering booking a flight, save yourself the headache and choose literally any other airline

Name: Julia N
Comments: I had an absolutely terrible experience flying with Royal Air Maroc, and I would strongly advise against ever booking with them. From missed connections to unjustified denied boarding, their handling of my journey was beyond unacceptable. 1. Denied Boarding for No Reason (15/03) I arrived on time at Casablanca Airport for my flight to London (AT806 at 13:45), made it to the gate 10 minutes before closure, and was still denied boarding. The reason? I was “not on the list.” Meanwhile, a male passenger on the exact same itinerary was allowed to board. When I asked for an explanation, none was given. Even worse, before my first flight that day was even delayed, I had already received an email saying I had been moved to the next day’s flight—without my consent. When I called customer service, they reassured me that if I made my original connection, I could board as scheduled. That was a lie. This resulted in a completely unnecessary 24-hour delay to my trip. 2. Delayed Flight & Missed Connection (07/03) On 07/03, my flight from London to Casablanca (AT801) was delayed, causing me to miss my connection to Dakhla. I was rebooked onto a flight the next morning, meaning I arrived at my destination over 9 hours late. No proper apology, no real assistance—just another headache to deal with. 3. Unsafe & Unacceptable Accommodation After missing my connection, I was placed in a run-down hotel near Casablanca Airport. As a young woman traveling alone, I felt extremely unsafe staying there. No proper security, no basic amenities, and absolutely no consideration for my comfort. To make matters worse, no food vouchers were provided, so I had to cover my own meal expenses. When I was denied boarding on 15/03, they offered me the same terrible hotel. At that point, I refused and had to pay out of pocket for a safer place to stay. Conclusion: Avoid This Airline at All Costs Royal Air Maroc showed zero care for their passengers and provided some of the worst customer service I’ve ever experienced. Their incompetence caused me multiple delays, extra expenses, and unnecessary stress. I would NEVER recommend them to anyone.

Name: mark g
Comments: OMG! Absolutely the WORST airline ever! We have been sitting on the runway for nearly two hours now with ZERO information on why we have not taken off. Told earlier is was due to weather but planes are taking off and landing right before our eyes. The staff will not allow anyone to use the toilet, and are yelling at passengers to stay in there seats. Never Again! Do yourseld and your family a big favor and fly another airline. This one SUCKS!

Name: Alexander P
Comments: The worst service I have ever experienced. Flight delays and cancellations of more than 24 hours without any compensation or apology from the airline. Customer support is practically useless and solves nothing. During the booking process, I made a mistake by swapping the passenger's first and last name, and I was told to buy new tickets. I have never encountered such unprofessional behavior from staff and, frankly, such disregard for customers.

Name: dominique H
Comments: In over 30 years of global travel, I have never encountered an airline as disgraceful, unaccountable, and discriminatory as Royal Air Maroc (RAM). While Morocco is a beautiful country with a rich culture, RAM’s systematic mistreatment of passengers especially Black people and Africans tarnishes its reputation. I booked a round-trip ticket from Paris to Cotonou directly through RAM. My NYC to Paris flight was smooth, and with a 12-hour layover, I stepped out for errands. Upon returning, I received an SMS delay notification, pushing my flight from 18:30 to 19:10 (though it didn’t actually depart until 20:00). Despite arriving at 16:20 with only 1 carry-on, I was denied boarding with reason that I was late. I had a family emergency in Cotonou, and RAM’s reckless treatment forced me to buy a last-minute ticket through RwandAir to reach benin. When I tried to use my original return ticket home, RAM refused to honor it, forcing me to purchase another ticket at my own expense while the entire plane was barely half full. What followed in Casablanca was outright humiliation. The staff was hostile, dismissive, and openly discriminatory. A supervisor mocked my frustration and threatened to ban me for insisting on my rights. Another boldly stated that Morocco “doesn’t care if Africans fly through the country” and would be “better off without Africans in particular.” This level of blatant racism and disrespect is unacceptable. This isn’t an isolated incident RAM has a Skytrax rating of 3/10, with endless complaints about: Unexplained flight delays and cancellations. Passengers denied boarding despite valid tickets. Rude, unprofessional, and openly discriminatory staff. Consistent humiliation of Black travelers, particularly Africans. A lack of accountability in refunding or honoring paid tickets. Royal Air Maroc thrives on exploitation, racial bias, and utter disregard for passenger rights. Such behavior would never be tolerated in the U.S. The fact that RAM continues to operate this way without consequences is shameful. Morocco deserves better. The world deserves better. Black travelers deserve better.

Name: Bob L
Comments: Avoid this airline if you value your time and comfort. Boarding was an absolute mess—no organization, no clear announcements, just a chaotic free-for-all. Once onboard, the service was just as bad: indifferent crew, slow responses, and barely any amenities. To make matters worse, the airline is stuck in the past—no digital check-in, no in-flight WiFi, and outdated systems that make everything painfully inefficient. Definitely not flying with them again.

Name: Bernard N
Comments: I tried to print my boarding passes online only to find out that because im flying from Canada I have to go to the ticket counter. ridiculous.

Name: Mor N
Comments: The worst airline in every category. Our luggage got lost. Non of the monitors worked. Food was disgusting. Not a friendly personals.

Name: Toni W
Comments: This is by far the worst airline with the worst customer service I have ever experienced. They lost my hand luggage, which I was forced to check in due to lack of space, and I never got it back. Despite multiple attempts to contact them, they do not respond or take any responsibility. To this day, I have not received any reimbursement or even a proper acknowledgment of my issue. The complete lack of professionalism and accountability is shocking. I would never recommend anyone to fly with this airline! Avoid at all costs!

Name: AB
Comments: I bought a ticket, and the next day, scammers with a phone number from Morocco started to chat with me in Whats App (as a woman who wants to be friends) and ask about my personal data. It's so fast; it seems like they have some automatic process to give/sell phone numbers to scammers. (I had nothing in common with Morocco; I never was there and used the mobile number attached to Whats App the first time in a year to buy the ticket)

Name: Goua Elodie Deb... O
Comments: I stayed on the airport for 2 nights without them offering me a good contort able place to sleep. They did not even care about our safety no food.the well of my suitcase was broken. I have lot to say but I will stop here. It is have been more than 6 months now I made a complaint about my last trip with Moroco Arlines and nothing is been done up to today. I have been told to receive a compensation refund. I sent all the documents that I have been asked to send. Which I did but I did not received any compensation refund up to today . I am really disappointed 😔 with your services

Name: Jean luis J
Comments: Royal Air Maroc is pretty bad. They lost my bag, and said it was their responsibility. Most of the hostesses, they are irresponsible and do not care about serving Royal Air Maroc customers. Never ever book with this ridiculous airline company.

Name: Driss C
Comments: I learned to fear RAM over the years, I don't travel that much, but when I do they manage to loose my luggage. Today, they just dis it again. No one there at the airport to support us, people with missing luggage, when you talk to them they don't know anything and it clearly feels they don't care. Worst company ever, avoid it at all costs, and if you can't, pray with your fingers crossed.

Name: Ghassan L
Comments: It’s by far one of the worst airline from delay prospective, I have been flying with them for many years, they never flew on time, but I have to use it as it’s the quickest one for my destination. Expect delays at any time of the year

Name: Tour26925418719
Comments: After reserving a flight in Oct of 2024, I was told the day before my flight that I need to pay 292 GBP more (on a 454 GBP flight ticket) in order to "confirm my seat" and be removed from standby. This was a confirmed ticket and was not changed. We were told that "iberia" does not provide the class of service we purchased and needed to upgrade this class on RMA to ensure our flight on Feb 26. They offered a free change to Feb 28th!!!! WTH!

Name: nee s
Comments: Horrible horrible horrible - HORRIBLE!!!!!! You have to climb and walk down stairs and I had Carey on luggage and the woman with strollers had no assistance. 2 people fell down the stairs. Then the condition of the aircraft was so dirty and old. They put a rose in the bathroom to try and what make it seem upscale. The food presentations was decent but the taste was dry bland and flavorless. The amount paid for a business class ticket it was more like flying in premium economy- the plane smells like old urine. The only thing that got a one star was the staff. They were great! By the way going was a different experience it was better.

Name: travelmavensny
Comments: We just returned from our trip to Morocco. I can say without hesitation that Royal Air Maroc is the worst airline I have ever travelled on, and I've been on some pretty bad ones. First, the planes are absolutely filthy. As we boarded, we saw food remnants from previous flights on the floor and on the seats. There was also some sort of putrid gummy substance stuck on the seat in front of me that got onto my clean jeans. I had to ask our first hotel to help me clean my pants (no amount of soap and water worked). They had to put my pants in a freezer to get this vile, stinking, gummy mess to come off. Then there is the repulsive food on Royal Air Maroc - which is totally inedible - the worst we have ever been served on an airline. One bite of the "beef" entree and I thought I would throw up. We refused all food on our flight back home. The Royal Air Maroc "entertainment system" is so old and unreliable that it constantly shut off on our 8-hour flight home. I had to restart the movies/shows at least 30 times (no exaggeration) on our flight. Add to the above, the endless delays, the truly stupid 1 hour wait in Royal Air Maroc's pre-board line before the official pre-board line (we had already been through 3 security checks), and the filthy, disgusting bathrooms. I will NEVER travel on Royal Air Maroc again.

Name: Culti T
Comments: My worst experience ever: Flight was cancelled due to technical problems with the airplane - all passengers were kept at the gate for 7 (Seven!) hours, last two hours without water and food. No information was provided… The worst airline ever - try to fly with someone else!

Name: meredith l
Comments: I would not fly this airline if my life depended on it. The boarding process to get on board this flight is akin to a hellscape. They made no announcements and you had to navigate 2 layers of security checks with lines that were unmanaged. Once you got past the first checkpoint there were no chairs and since I was traveling with my mother who can not stand that long, I waited back. Luckily, I encouraged us to get in line before the very end because they overbooked the flight by ~20 individuals and started turning away people at the gate. When we finally got to Washington, the airtag on my bag was still showing Casablanca. They made me wait for every single bag to get off the carousel before letting me lodge a complaint (~90 minutes extra wait). Then when I was about to leave the airport without my bag, they called me back saying my bag was there. It was NOT, instead there was a random bag that they had tagged to my name. It then took them 4 days to ship my bag to Washington and another 8 days for them to return the bag to me in Pittsburgh where I live. Thank god for my airtag because it took incessant follow up and tracking my bag to get them to do anything. Plus, they did not even deliver the bag to me. They required that I drive 40 minutes to the Pittsburgh airport to collect my bag. When I finally got it, the bag was beat up and ripped. Because it had been more than 5 days since my flight, I was owed compensation. I had filed a complaint on January 9th (5 days after my flight) and it took them until Febuary 14th to respond. When they responded, they said it had past the 21 day window and there was nothing they could do to help. I am still owed compensation by the airline for their mistake and I doubt I ever will. I would never fly this airline again and highly encourage you not to subject yourself to it.

Name: QueenBee X
Comments: I have never encountered such a disgusting flight in my life. The staffs are old and terrible they are so mean and very very disrespectful. They are not clean. One of them was stinking so much. Disgusting how they are flight attendants without maintaining hygiene. The food was extremely terrible and when asked for sugar they refused to give more sugar. No passenger should be treated this way. Zero respect and the attitude is disgusting. Zero recommendations for this flight.

Name: Andres V
Comments: 🚨 WARNING 🚨 DO NOT fly with Royal Air Maroc! My experience—and thousands of others’—was a nightmare. They lost two of our bags on the way to Morocco and another on our return to Miami, which was missing for two months. Their excuse? No compensation because they eventually delivered the bags—after two months. Customer service is nonexistent. No direct communication, and they take 15 to 20 days to respond to emails if they reply. Avoid this airline at all costs!

Name: Cynthia O
Comments: Having found it impossible to get through to RAM via phone (over 45 mins holding only to be hung up on) or online, I made my way to the airline NYC office in Rockefeller Center. There, the combined efforts of Nathan and Fatima exceeded any expectation. Stellar and creative customer service solved the issue. If all the staff at RAM are as professional, competent and client oriented as Nathan and Fatima, RAM is in good hands. 0/10 for phone service while 11/10 for in person service.

Name: Yo Y
Comments: They have an absolutely disregard for passengers! I had a transit ticket Toronto - Casablanca - Barcelona. At Casablanca airport, I waited 5 hours for the next flight. My flight was at 4 pm to Barcelona, but they did not even announce boarding! When I went to inquire at 3:40 pm, they had already closed boarding and there was no one at the check-in counter. Not only did I not board the plane, but other people too. They did not even bother to announce over the microphone the passengers who did not show up for boarding! I travel a lot, but I have never seen such a terrible attitude in any airline. I would like to say separately about Casablanca airport. It was impossible to find people there to resolve the issue of changing the flight. There was no one at the counters. There was only a telephone that you had to call and report the problem! I had a hard time getting through. They made me buy a separate ticket for the Casablanca - Barcelona flight. I had to sit on a chair for a long time and the night. The hotel, which was in the transit area, was closed, although the information desk showed me where it was, they did not even know that it was closed. They answered reluctantly, no respect for passengers. Those who do not have a Moroccan visa are not allowed out of the transit area. It was a terrible experience! I do not recommend anyone to go through this with this terrible airline and such a terrible airport!

Name: Mohamed Dhia B
Comments: Poor service, unprofessional and indifferent. In top of that I’ve never received my luggage. They sent an email saying that I will get refunded for that, it’s been four months no refund received yet. Fatima the Ticketing manager didn’t even bother picking the phone and let her agent dealing with the issue.

Name: Alyssia L
Comments: Absolute crap of an airline. Hard to believe that they still exist and have business. Overbooked my 12hr international direct flight, and said they could only replace with a second day transfer flight. Just a total joke and disgrace of an airline. Never fly this!!!

Name: Culture23408876254
Comments: I have travelled from Toronto to Malaga Spain through Casablanca just after Christmas. My Luggage did not arrive with me and i was without my clothing for 4 days.
