Instead of enjoying my vacation i needed to shop. On the way back the same thing happened. My suitcase has arrived after 5 days. This is very bad service. If I ever travel with this airline, it will be only with my backpack. The experience was not fun at all. Wasted time and money. I have filed a complain.......nothing. Maybe they don't want any new customers???

Name: Solange F
Comments: I traveled from London to Abidjan via Casablanca on the 14th of January and I have still not received my luggage from Royal air Maroc two weeks now from my travel date . Although a property irregularity report was filed automatically once arrived at destination nothing has been done until now . I find myself in a terrible situation.I have contacted Royal air Maroc by phone even walk in their agency in Abidjan 3 times but nothing. I am able to track my luggage so I shared the location with them but the luggage is still at the same position for 2 weeks .This is an appalling situation for an international airline to provide such a bad service and a shame to carry such a poor reputation by not caring about passengers belonging. I am still waiting for this situation to get fixed !

Name: Debbie T
Comments: Terrible customer service and satisfaction with them is 0 . I am still waiting for a miserly refund on lost baggage since July 24 . They have no way to speak to anyone who can help you know the progress of your claim . I’m at my wits end and have given up trying as it takes so much admin time and phone calling that go nowhere ! Do not travel with Air Maroc !!! When something goes wrong they are not going to help satisfactorily. Never again will I fly with them

Name: Anders P P
Comments: Doha-Casablanca-Gambia on 24th Jan. 25. QR could not issue Boarding Passes though having issued ticket. Eventually, I got BPs printed out quickly while boarding in Doha. Embarked after being bussed around in Doha airport. Aircraft was a newer Dreamliner B787-900, filled to last seat. Was in the middle of a midsection in the back, surrounded by passengers all over. However, the seats are spacious and can recline 20 cm. I felt comfortable and slept quite well. Food was served on large trays and main course was very delicious (spicy seafood) with plenty of support like heavy salad, desert, cheese and chocolate. I could choose my favourite meal despite being on of the last being served. Got an extra portion on request. On this 9-hour night flight the two meal rounds were valued and sufficed. Drinks plenty, including Moroccan wines and beers. Staff, 90% are Moroccan males, are professional, hardworking, focused, and pragmatic. They may appear being blunt but on firm requests they act well. They relocate seats up to last Minute and beyond to accommodate passengers wishes, allowing couples and families to sit together. Amenity kit, hear-sets, pillows, blankets provided to all. IFA promised a lot with big screens and options. However, it was not working properly for approx. half of the cabin, it froze again and again or ran into endless loops. In Casablanca, RAM kept their announced promises of providing a smooth STPC: hotel, meals and transport for long-hours transit passenger. Passed immigration without hurdles. I was put up in the fine 3-4 star Zenith hotel and got two meals within a 12 hours stay. Back to airport, accessed the RAMs Zenith Lounge which is spacious, fine: sufficient catering and tarmac views in two floors. Upper floor has a manned bar, while the lower have barista and meal catering. Lively and exotic, a surprisingly good lounge, including local wines of fair quality. Last leg, Casablanca to Banjul on a B737-800 was also a pleasure. Wide spaced seats, I was given my preselected exit seat without charges. Good, hot meal provided with three options. FAs were professional, all males. Catered well for, appreciated their seafood and wines. Recall, this is only a 3 hours’ flight with an impressive fully serviced catering with drink-rounds. Generous airline providing at least 2 x 23 kg luggage allowance for everyone Luggage’s arrived quickly and in good condition at final destination. Only minor spots: IFE unreliability and bus-gating in DOH and CMN. These are easily outweighed by other perks the airline provides. Ticket not expensive. First time with RAM, pleasantly surprised, can’t really fault them; fully recommended.

Name: Emmanuel R
Comments: Arrived to my destination, but not receiving my luggage is This is my worsted hairline ever And I haven't received the luggage yet I’m still waiting for it

Name: Ali C
Comments: Worst experience. Lost two baggage! they arrived after so many times calling them and after four days. Both were extremely damaged and not usable anymore! one with missing contents, including a bag of personal medicine/tablets. Not sure why someone would do that! They lack customer care. They blame the airport, and then the previous connecting airline before them. After wasting time going back and forth with them and other airlines, we got the policy that it is the final airline that needs to deal with the situation. Now they do not reply to our requests while we filled several forms, several times! No luck so far! Please avoid this airline by all means! Let me assure you that at least 40 people lost their luggage coming to London on the same flight - just imagine how an airline works. Their airport customer service is the worst. The guy doesn't even bother to look at you at check in, and the supervisors at both arrival and departurei said your baggage are confirmed to go through. But then we realised after arrivingn London that they didn't even check it! The whole customer service is just there to make you suffer. This is the worst airline I have traveled with!

Name: Bushra E
Comments: Going from Morocco to Washington DC, we lost a luggage, after a week we found it at our house door step. The plane seats are so uncomfortable the whole plane smells like urine and fish for some reason. And I’m not even kidding the bathrooms had crap on the walls I don’t know how that’s even possible. The plane doesn’t have normal AC so it was like a sauna mixed with urine smell. The stewardess's on the plane were rude if you ring them they ignore you. I wanted some water so I had to get up myself and get it but when I did the stewardess yelled at me, so I literally said what was i supposed to do! I’m dying of thirst and the plane is hot and smells. Another thing was that we got delayed for two hours because the planes electrical system wasn’t working, after they fixed it we took off. A few hours passed and were over the Atlantic Ocean the electrical system goes down again, I had a relative who was tracking my flight when I landed they told me that our plane said it was lost, so I’m guessing their radar system shut off too which was terrifying. The infotainment systems don’t even work. Honestly the only thing positive was that the pilot flew well.

Name: nathan w
Comments: If you are thinking to purchase Royal Air Maroc (RAM) tickets please reconsider. Regardless what are pros for your decision: better price, shorter flight duration, etc. believe me the cons would be not good. My flight from Miami to Amsterdam through Casablanca on July 5, 2024 looked good in all respects when was bought. Then they lost our two bags in Casablanca and it took them three days to find them and deliver. The customer service during my numerous calls was unsupportive, sometimes rude, and not helpful at all. Basically they were not responsive and negligent. We had three days before the cruise in Amsterdam that we wasted trying to get answers to: if they found the two bags or they had been lost. The answer was always “we are tracing your bags” uncommitted. We had incurred some expenses purchasing some clothes, necessities, etc. for upcoming trip considering that the baggage was lost or stolen. After all last day they just dropped bags at the hotel which we already left even without informing the hotel staff. I tried to file a complaint on the RAM app on line but the app was malfunctioning and wouldn’t accept the information at all. I was able to do it at the later day but they responded that their regulations require filing a complaint within 21 day from the flight day. The airplane was quite old and not properly cleaned. The food and service were bad. So it comes to the point if you want to have all the troubles and aggravations experience with such a company like RAM for a few dollars less?

Name: Precious S
Comments: I am unlikely to recommend anyone , i lost both my bags using this airline and the customer service is very rude ...i'm more than annoyed

Name: LARA U
Comments: My original flight, AT803, from London Gatwick Airport (LGW) to [Destination] on January 8th, 2025, was initially delayed and subsequently cancelled. Despite being advised to arrive at the airport early due to anticipated security delays, I experienced significant delays throughout the day. I was kept waiting in a holding area for several hours without adequate provisions, such as food and refreshments. Bear in mind I had been at the airport since 12 Noon until 9:00pm went the airline moved us to ahotel. Furthermore, the provision of hotel information was significantly delayed, causing further stress and inconvenience. On the following morning, January 9th, I was instructed to travel from Gatwick Airport to Heathrow Airport to continue my journey. This involved collecting my baggage independently, despite my age (73 years old) and health concerns, and transporting three heavy bags, including one for which I had paid excess baggage fees. Further delays were encountered at Heathrow AirportAT 801 and with my connecting flight at Cassablanca, AT555, experiencing a significant delay. Upon arrival at Lagos Airport, I discovered that my baggage had not arrived. I immediately reported this incident to the airport baggage services desk and filed a Property Irregularity Report (PIR), reference number LOSAT27078. This series of events has caused me significant distress and inconvenience.

Name: Tourist&tat
Comments: The worst airline ever.. They lost our two suitcases during the connection in Casablanca and the day after we had to pay a taxi, go to the airport to pick them up and spend the night without anything.. The complaint filed two weeks ago( beginning of January) still no reply, three emails sent and nothing..

Name: Olivia
Comments: My experience with Air Morocco was nothing short of a disaster. On my outbound flight, my checked luggage was lost, leaving me without my belongings for an entire week. Despite repeatedly contacting the airline, no one informed me that my luggage had been found. The only reason I discovered its location was because of the AirTag I had placed inside. Even then, I had to pay out of pocket to return to the airport myself to collect it, as the airline offered no support or assistance. On my return flight, the nightmare repeated itself—this time with my hand luggage. I was forced to check it in last minute, even though it was within the carry-on size requirements. Because of the rushed inconvenience, I didn’t have time to attach an AirTag, and now the airline has no idea where my luggage is. This bag contained expensive designer items and deeply sentimental belongings that I will likely never recover. To make matters worse, my return flight was also delayed, adding more stress to an already miserable journey. There was no supper service on either flight, leaving passengers to fend for themselves on long-haul journeys. The airline’s customer service has been completely useless throughout this ordeal, showing no concern for passengers’ well-being or the significant losses they’ve caused. This has been the most stressful and disappointing travel experience I’ve ever had. Air Morocco’s lack of professionalism, poor communication, and utter disregard for their passengers and their belongings is unacceptable. I strongly urge others to avoid flying with them, and I will never make the mistake of using their services again.

Name: Donna R
Comments: I arrived on 7th January without my suitcases. I completed a claim form at Banjul Airport. My medium size suitcase arrived on Thursday. Over 7 days later, I am still waiting to receive my large suitcase. I have generated a claim via email and via their website. Neither have responded to my concerns. No one at Air Maroc in Gambia can trace my suitcase and inform me that Air Maroc Cassablanca never reply to their messages or requests for assistance. Awful service. I want compensation, but have yet to receive even an acknowledgement of my online complaint.

Name: Curiosity07917532509
Comments: This is the worst airline to fly. They were incredibly racist, rude and blatantly insulted my aged mother. They made all sorts of comments about her ability and made us uncomfortable the whole flight. Our screens were not even functioning and they asked us to suck it up and that they could do nothing about it. If I could turn back the hands of time, I would delete the memory of buying this ticket. Royal Air Maroc is the worst. Definitely DO NOT recommend

Name: Damilare O
Comments: They are the worst airline have carried in my entire life. They will frustrate you and make you bleed. They’re not trying at all and they are the worst, i’m advising you guys not to carry the airline because your bags will be lost and they do nothing about it

Name: Vivien O
Comments: After 3 and half layover my bag containing very valauable stuff has still not been delivered this is 12 since I arrived and their site is such that you can’t process a claim..! I believe they search those bag and take the items for themselves. I need my bag delivered air maroc !!!

Name: M B
Comments: Don’t do it. I made the mistake of booking with them without reading their reviews and I sorely regret it. They are chronically late and for no particular reason, the boarding process is absurdly chaotic, there is no in-flight WiFi, the bathrooms are atrocious and the flight attendants are awful.

Name: yanis y
Comments: They changed my flight the night before. No communication prior to that. Which made me miss my second flight that was supposed to bring me to Romania. No refund accepted, they don’t want to work anything out. Lost 400$ because they were unprofessional. Wouldn’t recommend to anyone.

Name: emma
Comments: Overpriced and bad. For long flights there is a standard delay, there is never a tv in the plane and if you pay for extra space, you won’t really get it. It’s so bad and uncomfortable while you still pay the full price. I wish these companies would stop overpricing people. capitalism animals

Name: andy a
Comments: Suitcase lost. No assistance or questions answered. We were told to go home and our bags would be delivered? Hopefully they arrive but others reviews suggest otherwise. Dont recommend, spend the extra money on a different, reliable airline.

Name: TheGoHardFamily
Comments: Avoid Morocco Air – A Nightmare Experience Travelers, beware! Morocco Air’s poor business practices can leave you stranded and frustrated. They routinely overbook flights, you can have a you can have a confirmed seat and they’ll just dump you and if you’re bumped, they’ll rebook you only if you pay an outrageous same-day “upcharge.” Don’t expect compensation or any meaningful assistance—they simply don’t prioritize their customers. If you must fly with Morocco Air, here are some crucial tips: • Invest in Travel Insurance: Ensure you have a comprehensive policy to cover the inevitable disruptions. • Use a Reliable Credit Card: Choose one with charge dispute options to protect yourself financially. • Allow Extra Time: Plan for delays by scheduling your trip with a buffer of 3–4 days. Unfortunately, Morocco Air’s lack of professionalism and ethics is an everyday occurrence. Spare yourself the stress and consider alternative airlines whenever possible. By the way, five people on my flight were in the same boat with me flying back to the United States. All confirmed paid passengers that they bumped with no way to get them home.

Name: cqfp123
Comments: Flew Milan to Nouakchott, connecting in Casablanca. Booked directly with Air Maroc. Expensive economy ticket - this is not a budget airline. Fairly rudimentary website and app: special meals can only be requested by phone, not online; no chat. On the app, the bag tracking function doesn't work. Online check-in 48 hours in advance. Bag dropoff at MXP fairly efficient. Slow, chaotic boarding for both flights. Old aircraft without USB ports in economy class. Average seat comfort and meals. Both flights were late. For the first flight, at least they made an announcement and blamed "air traffic congestion". For the second flight CMN-NKC no announcements were made. The airport monitors showed the flight as "boarding" when the aircraft wasn't even at the gate! Boarding eventually started around the scheduled departure time and it was extremely chaotic, as the gate monitor showed the subsequent flight out of the same gate, and pax were lining up for the wrong flight. Once on board, the staff manually counted and recounted pax several times, then started checking baggage receipts for every pax on board, a highly unusual procedure. It became obvious that there was a problem with a passenger's luggage, as the staff continued to argue with them. Eventually the flight departed 1 hour and 35 min late. Not a single announcement was made and not a word of apology was offered. Would avoid this airline if possible.

Name: Célia L
Comments: THE WORST COMPANY YOU COULD TRAVEL WITH! They have my suitcase since 1 week at Casablanca airport and still did not gave it back to Emirates! Shame on you! no support, no work, no empathy. the worst of the worst.

Name: Bryce H
Comments: We flew Rome to Casablanca to Banjul. Flight was fine, but everything else was awful! We were traveling with four bags. Exactly one made the journey with us. So, along with 200 (was probably more) other lucky Air Maroc victims, we waited in line at 2 in the morning to file lost luggage claims. 2 bags made the trip the next day. So all I had to do was go to the airport...again...to claim them. I could have been sitting in the sun or walking the beach, but instead I had the pleasure of another $50 roundtrip Taxi ride and wasted two hours. Thank you Air Maroc. They assured me the last bag would make it today. Wrong. Stop me if I already said this but, I could have been in the sun burr instead I took a taxi and took two hours. Screw you Air Maroc. As the unhelpful, uncaring woman told me today...A flight comes from Casablanca every day. You can check tomorrow. Here is the funny part, if you are still reading, every hotel maid, desk clerk and taxi driver, were not surprised that we flew Air Maroc. 100% said that this happens always with Air Maroc. My advice is to fire your travel agent if the name Air Maroc is uttered as a travel option. If you must use this crap airline, DO NOT CHECK YOU BAGS!!

Name: Rhamen D
Comments: They are nothing but a scammer. Stay away from this airline. Had a carrier that was over just 7kg when I arrived at Casabalanca. The same carry-on that they weighed at JFK and never once mentioned my carry-on being over weight. When I arrived at Casbalabce to transit to my destination apparantely you get your bags weighed again. They charged for the over weight which I paid but somehow because of the dispute and not being able to pay in Dollar have to pay in their currency going to do an exchange caused to miss the flight. When I thought things couldn't get worse it turned into a nightmare. They told me now I had to pay penalty and a fare different to get on another flight, I accepted to do. Despite of agreeing to pay, for some reason they couldn't find me a flight for 3 days, and keep telling that business class is available. I said finally gived me a day that is avaible in economy. They finally give me a date which would of been 3 days in addition to the 3 days that I have already spent at the airport. Here is the kicker the fare difference from what they previously quoted me went from $300 to $800. I told them I rather give another airline that money than to you which is exactly what I did. Royal Air Maroc and Turkish airlines are in my list of airlines to not flight with. And may say do they have the disrecpectful, arrogant, and narcisit agents that work for them.

Name: Erik E
Comments: This has to be the worst airline ever. I flew this excuse for an airline to Morocco for the winter holidays. Paid $5k per ticket and they lost one of my bags. This happens. It is the experience of dealing with them since then that has been the most frustrating experience ever. They are lazy, stupid and incompetent. 14 days later and they cannot get my bag back to me even though they acknowledge that have it. Their customer service is a joke. DO NOT FLY THIS AIRLINE. From what I hear from the Moroccan's - this happens to almost everyone.

Name: Latintravelervic
Comments: Apparently the plane arrived late, the boarding process was disorganized and slow, we were held almost two hours on board before closing the door. The seats were extremely hard, needed cushion, ten hours seating on those seats were extremely uncomfortable. We arrived in Casa Blanca close to two hours late.

Name: Abigail B
Comments: Never ever travel this airline. We flew out from Gatwick and then they cancelled our tickets on the way back. They said we cannot board as they issued the wrong ticket at Gatwick and we had been registered ( I believe it was our instruments, as we brought an extra seat) as not leaving the country & therefore we could not leave. Well hi, we are stood right here and have a stamp in our passport etc. Do not, do not, travel with a corrupt countries government airline, I cannot stress enough the lying, gaslighting, lack of respect you are given. It is like you are on reprimand. I have also had issues with air India ( this being the worst, where I was stuck for 3 days going back & forth to the airport with fake issued tickets by the official desk due to their overbooking - another very corrupt, dishonest government airline) & air Kenya in the past. You won’t get compensation and you’ll be treated like you’re fortunate to travel with them. Extremely rude with a lack of accountability and customer service. We were told we then had a ticket and to run ( thanks for the stress), upstairs and then as soon as we got there be told we haven’t and cannot check in - this happened several times and in the end felt like a sick joke. Up and down between the lower level ticket office and the upper level check in - with our luggage. If we had been old or had a disability there is no way we would have made the second flight. They then said we could leave our luggage at check in, to then run up and be told to take it with me - I had no more hands left as my colleagues stuff was there too!!! I’d just run upstairs to get my handbag, as decided this was probably not wise leaving it with them, in the panic I took up there original offer. No help and constantly lied too. Then as we had 5 minutes ( because of their incompetence) to get through security for the next flight they put us on, we were told to go to the business counter, and as we got there dismissed due to being economy and told us we were being disrespectful by merely just relaying the information & instructions from the ticket office - who then later came up to argue our corner, and argue with their own department to let us on!!!! ( thank god one person wasn’t completely incompetent). They then had further issues trying to issue us a ticket causing insane levels of stress being told I now may not make the next flight ( again due to their incompetence, and no sorry). We run up and downstairs several times to be told conflicting information, given hope we would be going home and then told we were not. I missed a wedding that day due to this airline. I asked for several different options, like can we check in our instruments ( they are very small and permitted on other airlines, bar Ryanair), can I put it in my suitcase ( as it fits), it was all a no as apparently we had never left London. This is the worst airline. Save yourself the hassle and go to Morocco with easyJet or BA and fly into Marrakesh, it is not far from Casablanca. At least BA and easyJet have a customer service department, can usher the words ‘ I’m sorry for this’ and the one time easyJet had issues, I was given compensation. Do not travel on this airline, you will need decent insurance at the very least ( infact they didn’t issue us with any paperwork of what happened - so good luck claiming) or you will need good contacts in the country ( we had an agent, who eventually spoke to them which helped) to get you out of trouble.

Name: Aero3926
Comments: Shop hop in country. All went smoothly. Price is extremely reasonable. There are two terminals in Rabat and this flight is from Terminal 2 (not the main terminal, but only about a block away if you end up in the wrong place).

Name: Varney jr G
Comments: I had a really bad experience with Air Morac that I need to share. They stole items from my suitcase, including my expensive jewelry, hair and weave caps , and my sandals. It's incredibly disappointing to trust an airline with my belongings, only to have them mishandled like this. On top of that, my flight got delayed for 2 hours, which was frustrating enough. I was left waiting around with no clear updates from the airline, making the whole situation even worse. I expected better service and communication during my travels, but that was clearly not the case. To make matters worse, I didn't get my suitcase back for 2 weeks. When I finally received it, it was obvious that someone had broken into it because I measured it before it was 23 then when too 20 kilos This kind of treatment is unacceptable, and I would not recommend Air Morac to anyone. They clearly do not care about their customers' belongings or their time, and I will never fly with them again.

Name: Prince
Comments: TRASH AIRLINE. PLEASE do not ever travel with them. Doesn’t matter if it’s the cheapest ticket. There is a reason . Go with air Egypt or Ethiopian airlines It’s. A Muslim country but they lack a lot values

Name: Cutaaa
Comments: I traveled 111 countries in the world and travel with 100 of airlines but I never found such a third class airlines in my life. I think that the ground staff and the crew do not understand that they are paid for their service. Ground staff named Imani actually Harassed me. I bought the ticket of Qatar air and I had to take this 3rd class one because of one world group. She thinks her service is for free but no we are the who are paying for you. Another thing the crew thinks they are more important than the Morocco king. No manner. No Hello. Qatar should cancel their code sharing with them or teach them some manners. That does not code anything. I wish I file a harassment case against them. Toilets are dirty .

Name: Heba S
Comments: Chaos !!! Save yourself the headache caused by too many inconvenience from the rudeness and arrogance of the ground staff to a very old planes with very tight seats and very short leg room. Zinnat from the ground staff shhhhhhhed me when I was trying to tell her am a person of disability and kept punishing me to empty my carry one coz of just 1kg extra. I told her I cannot bend as I just had a major surgery and still in recovery. She didn’t care. Another agent that I asked him for help with my luggage and he gave me a lecture on why I am traveling when I cannot handle my disability. I am going to send a formal email to the Airline about these two, hoping someone will act and teach these two an abc customer service.

Name: T K
Comments: Many years ago there was a game people played where the name of an airline was re-imagine as an unflattering acronym. For instance, name of the Belgian airline (at the time) Sabena was said to stand for "Such A Bad Experience - Never Again". I was reminded of that when I flew with Royal Air Maroc (RAM) from London, via Casablanca, to Marrakech in June 2024 - with the thought that the airline should be renamed "SABENA". I wasn't particularly planning to write a review, until I happened to look at the reviews for RAM on Tripadvisor, and finding - to my surprise - that many people had had a similar experience, with a missed connection in Casablanca and all that followed (including promised compensation that never materialised). My story will be familiar to many who have also flown on RAM in recent times. I shoud mention first, as some others have similarly done, that I used to fly to Morocco frequently some 40 and more years ago - always with RAM. They were a good airline then, by the standards of the day. However, the Royal Air Maroc of those times is unrecognisable in the outfit that calls itself Royal Air Maroc today. In June this year, then, I was flying to Marrakech from London and it had to be via Casablanca, if it was with RAM. The flight from London had ongoing delays, most of them for no visible reason. Even the RAM ground staff in the departure hall had not idea why it was taking so very long before boarding was allowed. In the end, the plane left more than two hours late. It arrived in Casablanca some time around 22:30 (or later), and took ages to cruise on the tarmace to a parking position miles from the terminal. The steps had to be brought to the plane, and coaches filled up before they go could drive to the terminal. In the end, the plane was so late and everything after landing took so long, that the connecting flight to Marrakech, with a departure time of 22:40, had long left. That was just the beginning. These things can happen, and a good airline will deal with them in a way that minimises the discomfort to passengers. In this case, no RAM staff member on the plane (and I asked for advice) was able to give any help at all. I was told to "ask someone on the ground" but of course there was no one around who would help. Thinking they might have held the connecting flight back, I ran through long corridors and up and down stairs to the domestic departure terminal, only to find it almost empty, with the last domestic flight of the day having left. I then had to go through the painful experience of going through immigration control (it was now almost midnight) and again no one, and certainly not anyone from RAM, was around to help. I was going to sleep on a bench in the terminal, until at around 01:00 I took a taxi to a hotel about 3 km from the airport, returning early the next morning to wait for the new connecting flight. Returning home a week later, I contacted Royal Air Maroc's customer service department, and was told to write in with the details (flight numbers, ticket numbers, cost of the airport hotel, and description of the general inconvenience). I had a reply fairly quickly offering me a voucher for €500 or a refund of €400. I chose the latter. I was asked to give them my bank account details, which was strange, as they could have paid the refund to the credit/debit card with which I had made the booking. Nothing happened. After a reasonable time, I called customer services. They confirmed they could see the correspondence online and that I was due this payment, and they assured me that it would come if I waited. This conversation was repeated a number of times over the following months. Each time the person in customers ervices was friendly and polite. They would promise to send a message right away to the finance office, and were certain that this message would do the trick. After about five months, though, it dawned on me, as it should have done earlier, that RAM were not going to make any payment, at any point. Reading the reviews of others recently confirmed what I had suspected - that RAM do not pay the compensation that they promise (or at the very least, there are a large number of people who have been promised compensation by RAM, which never arrived). I would advise against using RAM. If you really have to use RAM, though, then avoid at all costs having a connecting flight with RAM - whether through Casablanca or anywhere else.

Name: Alfredo M
Comments: One of worst flight in my life. Mi luggage arrived broken and 4 months of complaning I didn't recieved the compensation yet. A lot of e-mails and they everytime have an excuse, like "we didn't recieve your bank account number, and of course they recieve it (three times). Don't fly with this company.

Name: Fearless45340339874
Comments: Shocking experience with this so called Airline. How on earth are they allowed to continue to operate with this level of scandal/chaos they cause? Distressing from start, flight delay, loss of luggage, missed connecting flight, careless customer service, no communication. Staff are rude and extremely disrespectful. Nobody is taking ownership, you get given the wrong information. No empathy, no apology, passengers are treated like rubbish. One member of their staff told me that if I feel that they are providing a poor service I should just stop flying with them and I said gladly as this was my first time flying with them and it will most definitely be the last.

Name: amr a
Comments: Here’s a more impactful and strongly-worded version of your review: The flight from JFK to Cairo was decent, but my return journey from Egypt to the USA with Royal Air Maroc was an absolute nightmare. A delayed flight was just the beginning of the chaos. When I arrived at JFK, my luggage was missing—and that was three months ago. Since then, I've received zero updates, zero accountability, and zero compensation. Every time I call customer service, I’m met with vague responses or outright indifference. It's like my missing luggage doesn’t matter to them at all. If I could undo my decision to fly with Royal Air Maroc, I would in a heartbeat. This experience has been a disaster, and I wouldn’t recommend this airline to anyone. Losing someone’s belongings is bad enough, but refusing to help or even communicate is unacceptable.

Name: Festus O
Comments: Terrible airline, poor and rude customer service, asking for refund with questions of deductions and keep getting the same reply everyday with no explanation then later got emails on each occasion to click on a link to confirm my agreement to the refund which is unusual. Avoid at all costs. I would never advise anyone to use this airline. The worst l have seen over 30 years of travelling.

Name: Alanson S
Comments: Avoid like the plague!!! Flown with them a lot in the past as my wife’s parents are from Morocco. This means that unfortunately there is basically no other option than to take this joke of an airline. Bad service starts at check-in where they make us re-pack carry-on bags because of a few kg difference. Even if we pay more than a regular return ticket to the US would cost, we generally feel treated like we are flying Transavia. On the flight, the crew is some of the most uninterested crew I have ever experienced, and this is on multiple flights. The food is alright at best, and I guess the highlight of every flight. Experience at the Moroccan airport(s) is of course not much better, but I guess RAM doesn’t have much control over that (or do they…)

Name: Molly
Comments: I am left shocked at how an airline can lose a customers luggage. You arrive at your destination bug your luggage is nowhere to be seen! HOW IS THAT EVEN POSSIBLE !!! This airline is a nightmare. I will never recommend to my enemy

Name: Tito F
Comments: WORST AIRLINE COMPANY: If anyone is thinking using Royal Air Maroc to flight ✈️ to West African countries. Don’t do it, This is a terrible airline company today I learnt my lesson to never ever use this company in my life again. I came on trip of 5 days to Guinea going to Siguiri for next day morning 🇬🇳 and I arrived my luggage did not arrive. And luggage service advised me to collect after 2 days upon my arrival on which I will in Siguiri coming back Friday and flying out. This is my first ever worse flight experience in my life. I will advise anyone in future not use this airline.

Name: Jeremiah O
Comments: This is the worst airline , avoid this airline for your mental health, everything is abysmal. I beg you please and please DONT AND DONT. thank you

Name: marsha a
Comments: The major issue I had is I could not get movies to watch. Tje flight was approx 8 hours so o did want something to distract me. I called for the attendant 4-5 times and when the food was served, made a point of telling the steward. They did reset the program but it didn’t help. Fortunately, I was able to move to an empty seat behind md. That should not have happened though and I’m annoyed that my request was not attended to.

Name: Alyssa R
Comments: Worst airline I’ve used. Every flight was delayed. Missed all connecting flights- the second of which there were no other flights to our destination for 3 days. If you are flying with RAM just assume your departure is delayed by at least 1.5hrs.

Name: Moha O
Comments: Their flights are always delayed which makes it hard to schedule connections. They never give you any information but they are good at trying to hassle you. My brother have yet to be refunded for a ticket that was canceled due to covid nor did they offer him a credit. They never answer their emails. I wanted my receipt. I emailed them a year and a half ago, still no response. Avoid them at any cost.

Name: Nash k
Comments: I am beyond frustrated with Royal Air Maroc. After a previous terrible experience where they lost my luggage, I hesitantly gave them another chance, and now I regret it more than ever. They’ve done it again , lost my luggage. How is that even possible? The experience didn’t end there. When I contacted customer service, I specifically asked for my luggage to be delivered to my home in Tétouan. Instead, they informed me that it was sent to Tangier, and now I need to pick it up myself. Tétouan is far from Tangier, and this level of carelessness and lack of accommodation is simply unacceptable. Their call center staff were rude, dismissive, and completely unhelpful. They didn’t seem to care about resolving the issue or about the inconvenience they caused me. This is not how any professional airline should treat its customers. The overall service is abysmal. The prices are ridiculously high for what Royal Air Maroc offers, and the quality is nowhere near worth the cost. The staff, whether at the airport or on the phone, are unprofessional and untrained. I’ve experienced better service from budget airlines than from Royal Air Maroc, which is supposed to represent Morocco internationally!!!!!!!!!!!! This is the last time I will ever fly with Royal Air Maroc. Losing luggage twice, providing awful customer service, and showing no respect for their customers’ time or needs have convinced me that this airline is not worth the money, effort, or stress. If you’re considering flying with Royal Air Maroc, don’t. There are far better alternatives. Save yourself the headache and choose an airline that values its customers.hahaha even Ryanair is WAY BETTER than RAM. I hope this review serves as a warning to others and as a wake-up call for Royal Air Maroc to improve their service. Unfortunately, for me, it’s too late.

Name: Nellie K
Comments: My flight from Montreal to Casablanca was okay. We left on time, service was okay and we arrived on time to Casablanca. I had a layover of 12h Casablanca and then took the next flight to Abidjan. We arrived on time, which is good… Now is the time to pick up our luggage and…NOTHING. Almost 65%-70% of the passengers did not receive their baggage. Is it normal for a company to flight their passenger without their luggage. Right now, I am in Abidjan with nothing to wear, absolutely nothing. We tried to contact the company, nothing. I never had good experience with RAM anyway. They lost one of my luggage in 2019 and never reimbursed me for it and another time, my luggage showed up totally unzipped. I’m pretty sure they don’t care but at least you know what to do.

Name: Escape35467131216
Comments: Worst airline of all time. Do not even bother!. So we get to the airport in Casablanca and then some of us leave the airport because we have a 12 hour layover we come back and they tell us that our bag is supposed to add up to 10 KG which was not advertised and it was not a problem in Torontoso everybody here has to check and pay for an extra bag which was never discussed never so yeah you do not

Name: Mama N
Comments: Ils volent tout a Casablanca. Please be careful, they are thieves and you will lose all your luggages and you are warned.

Name: gemma s
Comments: Awful… they lost my bag again (third time this has happened). I have contacted them on numerous occasions and no response or answers . My bag contained necessary items which I can not get in Morocco for my baby and they just don’t care. The second flight was also cancelled and so I did have to then fathom what to do at cassablanca airport at 1am with one baby. Did finally arrive at a hotel at 3am … but this is a small point to the overall awful customer service of the lost luggage.

Name: Alaere B
Comments: The worse airline ever. I travelled from London Heathrow to Nigeria last year December 2023. It’s Dec 2024, I have still not received my luggage or any form of compensation. They promise to compensate me and up till now nothing yet. My baggage was targeted as it contained all of my jewelleries, wedding items, brand new gifts and valuables were in that particular bag. You guys are thieves, you have thieves as staffs. I have still not gotten over the trauma arriving Nigeria without my luggage. You guys cost me a lot and it affected me psychologically. Air Maroc pay me back my money .

Name: Culture03155464146
Comments: You canceled my trip, wich i booked months in advance, a week before the planned trip and you made the transfer time so short (20 MINUTES!)that i would not have been possible to transfer from one plane to another.The flight cost € 599,-when i booked it.Your airline Royal Air maroc,-WHICH I ´LL NEVER FLY AGAIN-has ruined this planned trip to my home country.Yesterday i had buy a new ticket-by thAir France because of you the ticket cost twice as much as the one i originally bought.€1365.SHAMEONYOU

Name: Excursion617979
Comments: I travelled back from Bissau to Gatwick, first leg was fine but then I was double booked on the flight from Casablanca. There is only one flight per day and having not let me board Royal Air Maroc were terrible. Even now 8 weeks later I have had no response to my emails or been able to contact the airline.

Name: R C
Comments: Return flight to London,Gatwick from Casablanca was delayed by more than 8 hours and there was no communication from Air Morocco. After the incident, poor communication from the airline. Please avoid!!

Name: Hana B
Comments: I don't know why everyone is complaining about this airline. I travelled Fez to Cassablanca to Milan in September 2024. I could not fault them. They were better than Jetstar 100%. The check-in was easy, they were on time to leave, on time to the destination and my bags arrived. This is very rare with most airlines these days. The seats were comfortable and good leg room for me 165cm. Cassablanca to Milan had food service it was excellent. Arrived on time - other than bags taking longer than normal in Milan, I cannot fault this airline, I would fly with them again without hesitation and recommend them.

Name: B B
Comments: I am on day 5 of a 10 day trip without luggage. Air Maroc has been terrible. I flew from London to Yaounde, Cameroon via Casablanca on Wednesday 4th Dec. On arrival, it seems that nobody’s luggage had arrived and there had been in fact, a backlog of delayed luggage for quite some time. The luggage that had travelled on our plane actually belonged to passengers from earlier flights. There was no Air Maroc representative at the airport, only 2 airport workers who took over 2 hours to log all of the lost baggage reports. We were told our luggage would arrive on Saturday 7th December, and that we’d receive a phonecall to inform us. We had to chase it up yesterday, only to be told the luggage had not arrived and in fact they did not know where our luggage is. The Air Maroc World Tracer portal has been non-functional since it all started so we cannot even track our luggage. I will spare you the details of my personal difficulties in having travelled to a remote place without personal belongings. But I want to express my deepest anger and disgust at Air Maroc. A family member travelled from London to Ivory Coast 2 weeks ago with Air Maroc, and had exactly the same problem, only receiving their luggage 2 days before their trip ended. It is apparent that they have a HUGE backlog of delayed luggage, but are not informing passengers before flying. This is exceptional wickedness. The further insult to injury is the absolute lack of communication, which shows their lack of care, compassion and basic human respect for their customers. I will NEVER travel with Air Maroc again and strongly recommend that you do not either.

Name: Amenan Couboura S
Comments: Horrible airline experience ever. Never recommend. Flight keep delaying for more than 3 hours. Lost baggage, extremely long queue and corrupted taking years to make the clame and taking weeks without getting luggage back. Don’t make the mistake to take it , you will regret !!!!

Name: Charles
Comments: Worst airline ever. Don't recommend it. It has been 5 months I am waiting for the compensation since they cancelled my flight, and nothing has been done after following up more than 20 times. They don't act and don't follow European laws when flights are late or cancelled. Take Ryanair, it is definitely more premium service than RAM.

Name: Diana S
Comments: prior to flight I reserved a vegan meal. On the plane i was told that there is no booking for vegan meal at all. they did not offer anything, I had to ask at least for glass of juice. I had connecting flight with them which totalled me not eating for 30 hours. I can bear not eating. but humiliation i received from this company is unacceptable. Cabin crew member advised me to contact customer service to resolve the issue. i have contacted them after i got back home at the end of October. no reply, no contact since then, now it is December. I have called customer service in November, the reply from the lady was: i will send them an email. In short- horrible customer service.

Name: h-vaznayak
Comments: As someone who has travelled the world over for decades, and travelled multiple airlines, I can confidently state that RAM is the worst I have encountered. It was like flying an airline stuck in the 1990s. Difficult to navigate website, employees who couldn't care less about anything, to lax onboard procedures..... they have it all! I understand that they are all government employees - and so difficult to fire, but come on! Would it take that much to smile once in a while!!! Most of them had the attitude that they didn't want to be at work. Check in at both JFK and CMN were dreadful. The planes were barely cleaned, and the flight staff thought they were doing the passengers a favor by providing service. On an 8 hr flight, there was only 1 attempt to collect trash. At no point did anyone actually come out and check seat belts and seat backs. On board, the entertainment options were not only limited, but extremely dated. The sound systems were dreadful. 2 out of every 3 charging ports didn't work. The food was practically inedible - cold, hard, and dry......and if warm, tasteless! This is 2024 folks! Even the worst budget airlines provide better service. Avoid this airline even if they are most convenient and cheap direct flight. Vacationing in Morocco is lovely. Don't let this dreadful and disgraceful national airline of Morocco ruin your vacation!

Name: Lana P
Comments: Okay your customer service is awful, my husband called and spoke to an agent at marrakesh airport and they were extremely rude, not at all helpful besides to say our luggage was sent to Brussels. He didn’t give him a number or offer to be of assistance, someone with your airline needs to step up and provide customer service to your customers. It has been 42 days without our luggage, you have shown lack of trying to help us and zero cares! We have filled out the required claim multiple time, sent you emails, sent you message on Facebook and instagram, this is ridiculous!

Name: Manuel M
Comments: A total let down, arrived on the 30/11, baggage was left behind at Casablanca, I had a 3hr stopover, however plane was full so I guess too much baggage, next available flight from Casablanca with my baggage, 05/12. Useless.

Name: Lukas
Comments: had a transfer flight through Morocco with royal Moroccan airlines, made it on time to my connecting flight, they wouldn't let me board the plane but let other passangers board. clearly an overbooked flight and they simply told me to go to their comped hotel and catch the next days flight. i will not book royal Moroccan airlines again and i recommend no one else should either. all the best

Name: Debo A
Comments: Don't use this Airline - I wander how come they are still allowed to fly to europe. They misplaced by Luggage and they could not even be bothered to look for it -

Name: beth b
Comments: The worst experience of my life. I'm handicapped and they refused to use the transfer chair they promised, made me walk, the flight attendant just wanted to be done, so he pulled me with great force, pulled me to the ground, broke my ankle and then refused to let me straighten it, pulling me the other way and breaking my fibula again. 3 fractures. They roughly grabbed and squeezed my broken ankle instead of the foot rest, causing more pain Then we get to the new gate and the transport employee tried to make me get up and walk on a broken ankle He just wanted the chair back. They insisted there were no doctors, we date for 3.5 hours in agony. Then they did the same, squeezing my broken leg while moving me on the plane. They refused to upgrade me to Business, even though they had empty seats. Then in Carthage the flight attendant clearly stated to his colleague that he hates doing transport and helping people. He ran as fast as he could down steep ramps. Then we get to baggage, they have lost my power chair, and demanded I walk to the car. Luckily we had some Embassy support to insist that this was absurd. We used their chair briefly to get to our car. The worst, most painful, traumatic experience of my life. I'm on 2 weeks bed rest, I'm missing my vacation with my grandchildren, I'm in intense pain, we have had to hire a nurse to help. I complained online, they ignored me, I complained on Facebook they ignored me They SHOULD upgrade me to Business for our return flights as 8 cannot sit in a chair for 3.5 hours and then another 7.5 hour flight I assume they will lose my power chair again This is the worst airline in the WORLD. If anyone knows how to get a response from them I would like to know

Name: Nick W
Comments: This is the worst airline on the planet. They made me pay them in cash to check bags. Moved my wife to America from Morocco. They overcharged me. Broke half of the items in the bags. Told me they didn’t accept credit card and they needed 6300 mad for the bags. That is a lie. They saw an American and saw dollar signs. They pocketed the money. My bags came in shambles. This country is so beautiful but the people that run the businesses ruin it. They care only about money. They have no consistency. They don’t clean the bathrooms on the plane. It smelled like feces. They didn’t even serve water. Which thank god. That would’ve probably killed you if they did. I’ll NEVER fly with this airline. They are savages. A huge middle finger. Thank you for ruining what should have been a great experience. Disgusting

Name: Resort05573580973
Comments: I AM A MOROCCAN CITIZEN AND ALL I CAN SAY THIS IS THE WORST COMPANY THIS EARTH HAS PLEASE AVOID THIS CAUSE THEY WILL TREAT YOU LIKE A BEGGAR AND TRUST ME YOUR COMPLAINTS DOESN'T MATTER TO THEM AT ALL.

Name: John Barbour
Comments: I was bumped off a flight when I had already checked in from then customer service was terrible. the only way to get back was to take another flight. i have emailed Royal Air Maroc and heard nothing yet

Name: Lana P
Comments: Our luggage was put on the wrong flight, AT636 instead of AT638. When we arrived back in the states we had no luggage. Delta was our connecting flight and has been helpful to find 2/3 bags. We are still missing one, finally after a month yesterday I received 1 message via Facebook from Royal Morocco Air prior to that nothing. We have contacted by email, attempted to call, Facebook and filed claims. Very frustrated with lack of customer service! Lana Lee Peister

Name: Oumar D
Comments: I am writing this review on behalf of my father who just flew back last niggt after using RAM to go from DKR to Casa, and then Paris, back to Casa and New York, finally New York to Casa and Casa DKR. When he flew back to Casa from New York he was told by RAM staff to go to a specific gate for his connecting flight as his tickets did not mention anything. He sat there for 4 hours when someone finally came to him and told him he was at the wrong gate by then he missed his flight. The whole experience with this company was not pleasant by any means, and it was not the fiet time. My dad is an elderly person, he was fine catchimg the next flight a few hours later but the manner, the treatment he received, the lack of respect and making him pay a big difference for their mistake. Now he lost his luggage in the process... What happened to following up with him, calling his name through the radio prompt so he was awaee of the situation, sending a staff member to get him obviously knowing the passenger list...just a joke.

Name: Paul S
Comments: We recently booked an anniversary trip to Casablanca, with the second leg of our journey, costing approximately £900, booked directly through Royal Air Maroc. Unfortunately, both the outbound and return flights were severely disrupted due to last-minute cancellations. For the outbound journey, we were informed on very short notice that our flight would be redirected to a different airport, requiring us to travel to Heathrow instead of our original departure airport. This caused significant inconvenience. The situation worsened on our return flight during our anniversary in Casablanca. At extremely short notice, Royal Air Maroc cancelled our flight to Gatwick and rerouted us to Heathrow, leaving us no possibility of catching our connecting flights. Despite repeated attempts to seek assistance from Royal Air Maroc staff and customer service at Casablanca Airport, the experience was deeply disappointing. The staff were unhelpful, dismissive, and provided poor customer service. As a result of the return flight cancellation and rescheduling, we missed our connecting flights back home and were forced to purchase two expensive last minute British Airways tickets at our own expense to complete our journey.

Name: mr moe
Comments: Very dirty plane, I witnessed cockroaches Pleasee see pictures below. Fist class travelers have no first class bus. Bus was very hot and jamed.

Name: Voyage67377664130
Comments: A Nightmare with Air Maroc: Lost Luggage and Broken Promises I am writing this review to express my extreme disappointment and frustration with Air Maroc's handling of my lost luggage. In November 2023, my luggage was misplaced during a flight, and despite initial promises of a refund, the airline has since become unresponsive and unreliable. After numerous follow-up emails and phone calls, Air Maroc has completely ignored my inquiries. The promised refund has yet to be processed, leaving me in a state of uncertainty and financial distress. I urge potential travelers to exercise extreme caution when booking with Air Maroc. The airline's lack of customer service and disregard for its passengers is unacceptable. It is disheartening to experience such poor treatment from a major airline. I hope this review serves as a warning to others and prompts Air Maroc to take immediate action to rectify this situation.

Name: Hesham S
Comments: The screen for my seat didn't work! The flight attendants were not friendly. There was a two hour delay. The airport in Casablanca was hot, and the restrooms had many doors that didn't lock

Name: Appalled by Royal Air Maroc
Comments: Warning: If you are a woman traveling alone, do not travel on this airline. I was awakened by a drunk man on my flight who insisted on sitting in my row while there was plenty of room to sit elsewhere on the plane. I told him to leave me alone and he proceeded to sexually harass me for must of the flight. The cabin crew (of primarily men) did absolutely nothing to help me. I will never fly this airline again and am warning all women that you are at risk if you fly on this airline.

Name: Amir J
Comments: So I was going to morroco for a family vacation and stuff the check in process was pretty decent. But the delays were reasonable, The plane got delayed for 35 minutes and I have patience so it wasn’t that long for me. The flight was 7.5 hours the inflight entertainment was Super outdated. However the crew was very impatient, I was putting down my fork to grab my drink and the flight attended slammed the drink on my tray table. The food was classic morrocsn food, But that was my experience I’m not sure if it was just thst crew or the whole RAM crew but they were not friendly at all

Name: MarwatSA
Comments: As a loyal customer who has traveled with your airline for years, I was deeply disappointed by my recent experience on November 4th from Paris Orly to Marrakech. Despite being an early bird at the airport, I faced disrespectful treatment from your check-in staff regarding my dog’s carrier, which was compliant with your own guidelines. Instead of assistance, I encountered belittling behavior and insults, which is unacceptable for any customer. This experience marred what should have been a joyful journey.

Name: Laila Z
Comments: My experience was really bad with Royal Air Maroc. There was a couple hours delay in Casablanca. They boarded us on a bus to go to the plane but it was idle for 30 minutes with no communication. The food was terrible. I missed my connecting flight from Miami to Tampa. There was no one from the airline at their counter. I slept at the airport and went to the counter at 5 am and no one was there. I felt the crew did not care for us and our comfort. They should have provided us with food, transportation and hotel but they did not.

Name: Patrick n
Comments: An overall awful experience. 7 hour delay with no communication. It was an hour after scheduled departure before before the gate agents even bothered to come to the gate. They had no information on flight, they just came to give us a $15 food coupon and then they left. They finally showed up 6 hours after regular scheduled flight and said they hoped we would leave in an hour. When we finally left the business class service was horrible. Food inedible. Seats broken. No front door to plane so as business class customer you are last off the plane - not great when your 8 hour connection is now 15 minute connection or be stranded for three days. As expected my luggage never arrived and they would not allow an on-line or phone claim. No employees at airport at 1:00 am arrival and next flight at IAD was three days in that is when employees return. Do you self a big favor and do not fly this airline

Name: Nichole B
Comments: I have flown thousands of times, and this airline, without a doubt is the WORST I have ever encountered. Every single flight (round trip with layovers) was delayed. We spent over 36 hours trying to get home for what should have been a 3 hour trip. I would say they're customer service is horrible, but to honest, its non-existent as there are no employees to be found. I would recommend any other mode of transportation, such as a horse and buggy, before recommending this airline.

Name: Vikki B
Comments: Do not use this airline! Lost bags, rude crew, no service to find lost bags, delays & no communication from crew or pilot about our delays . They do not update you- they expect you to call them daily. They are t helpful about what items you can purchase. The claim they have no faculty to call you! It’s the most awful lack of service I’ve ever experienced. Would never use again.

Name: G S
Comments: This airline is as bad as all the reviews say. Lack of communication on why our flight was delayed, flight attendant lied to us about our connecting flight holding for all of the passengers who were connecting and the plane itself was dirty and gross

Name: ppfc
Comments: Morocco is becoming the jewel of Africa and it was amazing to see the modern life of Rabat and Casablanca. And yet when it came to Royal Air Maroc, unfortunately there was nothing Royal or modern about it. While the people of Morocco are extremely friendly, the staff on this flight were sullen and lost. The business class section is old. The movies are all 10-15 years old and the seats next to each other are at different heights. But the crown jewel of the trip was the crazy meal served to us for a $4k ticket on a 9 hour flight. The meal had three ingredients- boiled potatoes, boiled lentils and boiled rice. No appetizers or dessert. It could be sheer incompetence. Or sheer corruption where the caterer gets to substitute boiled food in lieu of business class meals

Name: Roving62938983805
Comments: HEATHROW TO LAGOS At thr stopover in Casablanca, the first taste of horror met us while unboarded and waiting for wheelchairs to connect the flight to final destination. I almost missed the fliga passenger missedhus connection flight (an elderly sickly gentleman and a lady who had to shed tears as she shouted loud for attentio HYGIENE The filthiest, most unkempt aircraft I ever boarded in my entire life, and I am a frequent flyer around the world on other airlines. Upon getting on board, you could smell and see filth all over and you had to practically use your hands to remove debris before sitting down. The passenger front pockets were an eyesore for each passenger. Only one toilet worked after a couple on hours - out of two dedicated to economy seats passengers on board this big aircraft. CUSTOMER SERVICE This was not bad, however, it was below standard. PASSENGER SAFETY AND SECURITY Non-existent as security belts were not checked even after announcements were made. FOOD Bland, tiny portions. The meal from Lagos to Casablanca was an apology. PRE-BOARDING This remains one never before now experienced. No word justifies the threats and verbal abuse permitted on passengers at the MMA boarding process points. Not a single RAM representative available for supervision to expected RAM standards. ARRIVAL HEATHROW One of three luggage missen. This was delivered three days later. No explanation, no apology. ENTERTAINMENT Quite another level of disappointment. The to and from Lagos legs were the most horrific.

Name: Rebecca N
Comments: To start - I had a standard experience of checking in for this flight and the customer service on the flight itself was good. However, I had the most horrendous experience of a lost bag I have ever experienced - in summary: never check in a bag with royal air maroc! I cannot stress how awful this experience was. I have detailed my specific experience below. When I arrived at Casablanca airport my bag I waited for my bag but it never arrived. I then went to the lost bag desk and after waiting for 30 minutes they eventually told me that lots of the bags on my flight hadn't arrived (prior to that only Arabic/Spanish was spoken so I didn't know what was going on - I speak English/French). I eventually was able to talk to a customer service representative who told me they didn't know where my bag was and that I could have it redirected to my next destination, Fes, which I agreed to. They offered no compensation for the loss of the bag, no way to track where it was and only provided a reference number for my bag and a number to call (which was challenging as I didn't have a sim!). Twice a day on my 7 day trip I would call for updates on the location of my bag and requested that they not re-route my bag to Fes but keep it in Casablanca (i.e. requested 10+ times). During these calls the staff gave me conflicting information on whether they had located my bag and where it was being sent - they all confirmed it would stay in Casablanca and not be sent to Fes and could not tell me whether it had arrived in Morocco or not. They provided no online way to track my bag or provide any written evidence that they had lost it - they refused to even send me any emails. The staff on the phone were rude, impatient and incompetent. At the end of my trip I was then informed that it had been sent to Fes despite my twice daily calls and assurances it would be kept in Casablanca. This was absolutely infuriating. This was after I went to Casablanca airport (and through three security checks and hours lost) to see if my bag was there. My bag was then re-routed to London and they refused to send it directly to my house but only to the airport. The bag desk also told me that I would have to ask Royal Air Maroc staff to receive compensation - I then went to the RAM staff at the airport and they were extremely dismissive of me, told me to go to other people, refused to help and sent me round in circles. I am a young female solo traveller and this was an extremely unpleasant and unnecessary experience. I eventually got my bag back weeks later and the London airport staff who were competent and helpful arranged to send it to my house for free. I have still not received any written evidence from RAM that they lost my bag, nor any compensation, nor an apology. I managed okay without my belongings but as my contact solution and backup contact lenses were in my checked-in bag I had to bin my monthly contact lenses (as stores were shut) and wear old prescription glasses for the entirety of my trip. I managed but not being able to see clearly was far from ideal. In summary: The experience of trying to get my lost bag back was 1000 times worse than spending the week without my belongings. Never check in a bag with Royal Air Maroc and better yet go with a different carrier entirely.

Name: cdent53
Comments: Our return flight to Brussels was just amazing. Clean toilet just for businesstraveller. Nice staff and worldclass service for a 3 and a half hour flight. You can‘t offer more. Compared to other airlines the offer and quality of food was gorgeous. Service 5star . Thanks to charming staff.Even the trolley they use to serve was well decorated.Definitely can recommend

Name: delphine k
Comments: I have traveled all my life all over the world but never had such a bad experience! My advise is pay more money for your ticket without hesitating one second. They lost my suitcases. It was almost impossible to make a claim in Miami and anyway was useless (an employee explain to me that they do not even use the barcodes of the suitcases at the connection in Casablanca and that 's why the "world tracer" is useless.) I sent them all the paperwork they were asking since my luggage were "lost" at the connection in Casablanca mid August. 2 months later I still have not received an email or anything from them. At the phone they only say that it is in process. HORRIBLE SERVICE!

Name: BRAHIM A
Comments: Septembre 29/24 Sunday it was my worst day from Casablanca to Washington Dulles airport delayed over 5 hours is not only first time to many times is delayed without apology or claim

Name: Michael N
Comments: How did this lot get 2.5 stars? I've caught 600 odd flights and this was the worst with the most unhelpful staff of all of them. We were flying from Marrakech to Lisbon with a 25 hour stopover in Casablanca. THEY KEPT OUR BAGS! We were never asked at check-in whether we wanted our bags booked through and considering it was a 25 HOUR stopover, I didn't think to ask. When they didn't come off at Casa, we could see them through the tarmac glass. They said the only way they would give them to us was if we cancelled our flight completely (losing all money) and rebooked and paid for another. Our bags sat there for 25 hours with anyone from the airport having access to them for 25 hours. That stuff's scary!

Name: bouchra l
Comments: Horrible service. my flight was about 11 hours delayed. No apology email was sent from the airline. where meals were served, started eating a piece of bread and the bread tasted moldy. On the return flight, my seat was dirty, read and brown spots on tray and the entertainment video system was not working. i sent them 2 complaint emails and they never responded.

Name: Ann Marie B
Comments: AVOID AIR MAROC at all costs. I have never written a review before but this airline is beyond the pale. After getting in line to board my flight from JFK to Liberia, all passengers were asked to return to the gate as the aircraft was experiencing "technical issues". Four hours later, with infrequent updating on flight status, flight was cancelled. Forced to take another flight, my bags were never delivered to my final destination on their next available flight, No one in Air Maroc seems to know where my suitcases are. Call center is TOTALLY unhelpful. In order to request a refund on line for my ticket I was instructed to first call Air Maroc and officially cancel my flight which I did. Yet they keep sending me boarding updates to the flight I cancelled. I am waiting for further communication regarding my refund and suitcase status. I requested a refund from a previous flight that was cancelled in March; to date I have not received a refund. Numerous emails about looking into it but no refund. DO NOT EVER EVER fly on this airline. It distresses me to write this negative review, because I usually give airlines the benefit of the doubt, knowing that there are always occurrences out of their control. But the inept handling of these circumstances is truly frustrating!!!

Name: Kimberly C
Comments: We were flying to Morocco for our wedding, to my husbands hometown. Last week we had to evacuate our home from Tampa due to Hurricane Helene flooding our city. We cannot go back to our home because it is destroyed. There is another storm Hurricane Milton heading to Tampa and we cannot get back due to evacuation orders. Royal Air Maroc WILL NOT HELP US. We have requested to cancel the flight from Tampa to JFK and we will drive to JFK and they said it will cost $1,067 per person to cancel the first flight and make no other changes. They do not care that we are displaced due a natural disaster and my husband asked to speak to a manager in Arabic and they told him no manager will speak with him he can try emailing to complain. We will never use Royal Air again. Our family of 12 that flys between USA & Morocco multiple times a year will never book another flight with this airline. We have already paid $3,000 for my husband and I to fly ECONOMY for this trip and they are trying to charge $1,067 per person to cancel the flight from Tampa to JFK.

Name: Christina D
Comments: This was my first time flying with and hearing about Royal Air Maroc. My trip included one flight from Milan to Casablanca then another from Casablanca to DC. Pros: a one-way ticket from Milan to Washington DC with two checked bags and two carry-ons for less than $400? Unbeatable. Anything longer than a 2.5 hour flight, they feed you a hot meal. So going hungry on these flights were not an issue. For long flights they provide a pillow and a rather comfortable blanket. The service was great! You get the chance to step foot in Morocco, super cool. Both flights were relatively on time. No problem with receiving our baggage. Cons: our first airplane was significantly outdated, as a somewhat nervous flyer this made things tremendously worse. It did not look updated since the early 2000s and looked a bit dystopian. For conveniences, it lacked outlets/USB ports, inflight entertainment, WiFi, and bendable headrests. Seats in front of us were damaged and looked to be falling apart, mine had paint stains on it? An uncomfortable experience, I couldn't wait to get off the plane. Our second plane was much more upgraded however still pretty unclean. Someone had left a piece of gum on my seat that was never cleaned. Our tray tables also were stained and not wiped down. The bathrooms were not well kept. This plane had the faux purple leather just as the older ones which just are not too comfortable for very long. The food was just alright. Nothing to remember. The crew didn't speak the best English both flights, so anytime an announcement was made it was difficult to understand. Which again, makes a sticky situation for a nervous flyer during turbulence! 😬 Next time I'd probably just save up more money to go with a more reputable airline. For 12 hours of travel, I'd rather have a comfortable, clean, and more trustworthy experience. But hey, you can't beat the price.

Name: Tessa K
Comments: The worst service at the airport. I have never experienced such poor customer service ever in my life. Flight delayed resulting in missing our connection. The ticket issued in Barcelona would not scan resulting in the airport team not allowing us to board until we visited transit and got a new ticket. In transit they advised us the flight has left as captain would not wait. Issued a new ticket for 24hrs later. No compensation no apology no hotel nothing. They simply refused to help or assist. The purpose of our travel was for a bereavement. When calling the customer service line after arriving back in the U.K. - they simply would not accept any form of complaint and requested the complaint must be logged at the airport first. Even explaining the airport staff were unhelpful and did not help me or provide any support or log of a complaint. The people working for this airline are shockingly rude. There is no customer service with this airline. I would strongly advise you not to fly with this airline company.

Name: Fatima zahra Z
Comments: Horrible service and cabin crew are the worst. I ordered water and did i did receive it at all even after ordering form different members. I had to wait till they serve dinner which was 2h30min later. The seats are not comfortable at all I don't recommend

Name: PeregrinansOrbis
Comments: We wanted to spend a few nights in Marrakech after arriving in Casablanca, and opted to take a domestic flight on Royal Air Maroc and back to Casablanca. Big mistake. First off, the airline insists you show up for check-in some 3 hours before departure. Seeing the long lines of travelers trying to get into the terminal at RAK suggests that this is not an idle suggestion. What's more, both airports are confusing with many contradictory signs, so we wound up running back and forth between Terminal 1 and 2 in search for our gate. Then--get this--we had to once again stand in a very long line for passport control in Marrakech, even though we passed through customs and passport control in Casablanca the night before! On a domestic flight! Followed, thereafter, by another passport check! Bottom line: if you want to go from Casablanca to Marrakech, take the train! It takes only two and a half hours, which is a whole lot faster than trying to travel on a domestic flight.

Name: tuprof_bill
Comments: Our Casablanca-Dulles flight was delayed six hours due to “technical issues” with the scheduled plane. Ok, this can happen to any airline but seems to be standard operating procedure with RAM based on: (a) reviews posted here, (b) at the Casablanca airport the number of delays/cancelations posted on the departure board (and without any prevailing weather or labor issues) and (c) comments from RAM staff. Being retired, my wife and I prefer to fly premium economy when traveling internationally. This isn’t an option on RAM. Hence the coach experience with the extended delay was particularly infuriating. This airline should pay travelers to fly with them.

Name: Ms M
Comments: This is worst and terrible airline have ever travelled with please people should stay away from them I travel with them on 7th of September and they lost my both two bags 23kg luggage’s and their airplane are very dirty their customer service are so poor their toilet are so dirty and very stinking I rang their customer service regarding my luggage they keep giving different excuses they are lying till today my luggage’s are no where to be found I send them couple of emails they never respond I regretted travelling with them i think they are just cheap for a reason pls stay away from them

Name: A A
Comments: Booked air morraco trip with a connecting flight in casablanca. Leaving out of JFK, NY, the flight was delayed for 5 hrs then canceled. I understand that this can happen, but the lack of communication was next level. Took another 2 hrs just to get us somewhere to get our checked in luggage. Then another 2 hrs in customer service line. The best part , I asked a royal morraco representative at the beginning of the line. If I was in the right line because, I want a refund and not a rebooting. I was assured that I was in the right line, 2 hrs later. After I get to the counter, I get told by the SAME representative that I need to go to a different line. Note, customer service number doesn't work. It is cheap for a reason.

Name: Dreamer46071701838
Comments: Flight was cancelled. After doing the cancelled flight compensation claim and have it confirmed by them that they need to pay compensation. There has been no payment for over 3 weeks. Everyday the "support" is lying that withing few days i will receive the payment but no payment has been made. According to them it with financial department since 02.09. So seems like they don't have money or just ignorant.

Name: Phil Donnelly
Comments: Flight from Accra to Lisbon via Casablanca. Luggage never left Accra or never left Casablanca, Royal Air Maroc dont know, and dont care according to Menzies aviation. They dont reply to messages. Their email account is full and doesnt take new emails. They dont respond to the Menzies Handling service, even thought Menzies handled the bag from Accra. But the Menzies staff in Lisbon cant track the bag they took in Accra on their own system and blame RAM for losing the bag, that thy are supposed to have transported.

Name: Map houston
Comments: There were 3 people in our party and not one of our 3 bags (all that looked different except for luggage tags identifying our addresses, and not one of our 5 suitcases showed up on the luggage carousel. We did however have AirTags in the bags and could easily our bags had arrived despite them trying to convince us they were all still in Heathrow. In fact, the 5 bags were all scattered at difference spots around the tarmac and had to have been deliberately thrown off the luggage cart in a deliberate attempt to insure we were unable to reclaim them. After hours of pleading past midnight we finally found one worker that went on a cart and rounded up the deliberately tossed suitcases. If we had not had air tags I am confident we never would have gotten them.

Name: Titi A
