Comments: My luggage got missing since June and up till now it hasn't been found and no compensation. No staff of the airline called to update on how to resolve it. It's been back and forth since we filled a filled the complaint form. VERY TERRIBLE AIRLINE

Name: Afiyo c
Comments: On 27th August ,my flight from Accra to Casablanca delayed an hour and some few minutes without any explanation given. We arrived in Casablanca and my connecting flight to Frankfurt had left because of the delay. T he airline did not communicate to us till we went to their from desk at the airport and we were informed of a 24hrs Layover because we missed the flight, meaning we had to spend a day in Morroco .Unfortunately we with Ghanaian passport were not sent to a hotel with the excuse that their Immigration policies does not allow African without morroco visa to leave the airport.So we were asked to Layover at a lounge inside the airport with the men .No bathrooms to shower,no washroom .The nearest washroom was outside the lounge.We were given chits to go meals at the airport food court, which had very rude workers! On 28th we took off and arrived in Frankfurt Unfortunately 1 of my luggage was no where to be found .I made a complaint, and after tracing, I received it on the 4th day of arrival... Now here is my Issue: On the 10th September ,I checked in to fly back to Accra through Casablanca. During Check in ,I notify their staff I had my mum's medication I bought in Germany and some fragile items so he should prioritize my luggage.He place a priority tag on it and with high hopes. I arrived on the 11th September in Ghana and history repeated itself.My prioritized luggage did not arrive with me .I made a baggage irregularity report at the airport and they still can't trace it.I've called several times,sent mails and asked a friend to call in Germany but to no avail. From all the reviews I've read currently it's seems they are fond of that however I don't want my case to be the same mainly because I specifically made them aware I had my mum's drugs in it.

Name: Junisa M
Comments: To be honest this has to be one of the worst experiences I've ever had. Staff not well informed of their roles and duties:-(

Name: Ruiz S
Comments: Worst airline I ever flew. The worst customer service. Cabin crew very unprofessional. Their aircraft very unsafe and uncomfortable. Fly at your own risk

Name: Yomi S
Comments: Stay away from this airline Horrible experience with the airline Thieves Anything worse than bad Please kindly go with a better airline

Name: Sara A
Comments: Terrible experience like every time before. The service 0 , food 0 , Staff 0. The flight attendants are not professional at all, specially the boys.

Name: Lakeshia W
Comments: This was my very first long international flight and my first time using this particular airline. My experience on this was terrible due to the constant smell of cigarette smoke throughout various periods of the flight. No one seemed to be concerned especially the flight attendants. It seemed like just a normal day on the job for them. Luckily I had an N95 Mask to filter some of the smell, but it could only do so much with the constant smell of smoke coming through the vents. Imagine an 8 hour nonstop flight with smoke just constantly in your nose and there is no way to escape the smell. It was a very miserable experience to say the least. I never been on a flight that allows smoking and so much lack of concern or respect for PAYING customers health! I'll never choose to be choked out by this airline again! It's very ridiculous how they allow people who choice poor health to operate and risk the lives of healthy individuals. I wouldn't recommend this airline to anyone without throughly warning them of what's coming. The return flight home was just as worse. They smoked on that flight as well with no regard to the passengers health. I had to literally wrap the blanket they provided around face just to filter more of the smoke smell.

Name: Tamba T
Comments: Re: Flight #: AT 200 Royal Air Morocco's treatment of black and African passengers at the airport and on their airline has left a negative impression on the Morocco Arab culture, and overall perception of Morocco. During my experiences traveling through Morocco with Royal Air Morocco, I have felt uncomfortable due to the behavior of some members of the Arab population. Specifically, there seems to be a lack of respect towards African Americans and African passengers, with instances of rudeness and perceived racism towards African Americans and Africans. Perhaps it is the negative perception they have learned in school or perhaps is their upbringing, nevertheless, It is challenging to find non black or mixed individuals in Morocco or with Royal Air Morroco who are not of black or mixed descent that speak respectfully to African or African American passengers. Simple questions can lead to confrontations and yelling, which I believe is a reflection of the cultural attitudes in Morocco that is aligned with the airline's service. Their aggressive attitude and rude behavior creates an intense atmosphere during the entire flight. I liked Morocco before in the past - the lack of respect, rudeness and ridicule expression of racism toward passengers that are not white or Arab has turned me off from anything Morocco. There's no reason to dislike others and pick and choose between who to respect and who not to in such an advance world. Morocco as a country, Air Morocco and businesses need to educate themselves about the dangers and impact of racism climate. At the airport, I encountered six extremely rude women before finally finding one who was willing to assist me. Additionally, there was an incident where a man yelled at my disabled mother when she struggled to climb stairs, claiming it was not his responsibility. However, he was helpful to a young Arabic-speaking woman at the same time. It's disappointing, disheartening and overall disrespectful. I have been to France so many times and I never experienced the level of disrespect, hostility, hate and racism towards black people like it common in Morocco. I even travelled to the villages in France and the people there are not as disrespectful. I understand that Morocco is a 3rd world, but the people should do better.

Name: Bob J
Comments: I frequently travel to Morocco and I am always appalled at royal air Marc. Nearly every time I go I experience delays and when someone or I ask most of the time they do not know. Planes are also dirty and are not cleaned properly. Even my tray for food was dirty the last time I traveled.

Name: omirin e

Name: Amin K
Comments: Liars, bad treatment , they promised us transportation and hotel , one agent escorted everyone away from the gate and then just disappeared leaving everyone to their own faith, kids , older people, NEVER NEVER NEVER AGAIN ROYAL AIR MAROC

Name: Coastal50540972331
Comments: I have 3 luggages missing with very valuable family items, I made a claim in the airport immediately; 2 weeks later no word and help whatsoever!!!!! I have pictures of the 3 missing luggages but no way to submit them to anyone!! 1- CUSTOMER SERVICE NOT HELPFUL: When I call customer service: They will read the same script and tell you they handle booking and not luggage, but they do not have customer service number or an email for luggage service. The only answer: KEEP WAITING; SOMEONE, FROM THE LUGGAGE SERVICE, ONE DAY WILL CALL YOU. 2- CUSTOMER SERVICE WILL NEVER TRANSFER CALL TO A SUPERVISOR, IF YOU INSIST THEY WILL BECOME RUDE, HANG UP ON YOU and BLOCK YOUR LINE FROM CALLING!!!! 3- CUSTOMER SERVICE EMAIL USELESS: If you email serviceclient@royalairmaroc.com , email will respond back with that "email cannot be processed as email inbox is is assigned to ongoing claims introduced through the dedicated form available in our website." 4- LUGGAGE INVENTORY FORMS EMAIL BOX IS FULL: I have tried on multiple occasions to use the luggage inventory form and submit it to inventoryform@royalairmaroc.com I received back "The recipient's mailbox is full and can't accept messages now. Please try resending your message later, or contact the recipient directly." So I cannot receive a reference number. 5- CUSTOMER COMPLAINT FORM NOT WORKING: When I submit a claim form in https://www.royalairmaroc.com/ma-en/information/service-claims; It does neither give a claim or reference number back NOR an email confirmation.

Comments: Maybe I’m just spoiled by being use to being treated as if I were a human.. but this wasn’t it. The only redeeming aspect is that I was given a hotel room for my long layover.. however she was disgusting and I refused to sleep in the bed. Nothing about my experience was positive..I am actually offended, and will never fly again.

Name: shilpi v
Comments: Horribly managed Airport. They treat you like cattle. Air Maroc counters suck . Air Maroc has the worst 2airline staff. Air Maric lady supervisor doesn’t even speak to people . We were sent to 3 different counters for check in.After doing this for 30mins we were told to go to the supervisor. Comments: This is the most horrible flight have ever seen. Took days to get my items. Already got spoilt. I wish to sue them cos they ought to have informed in their booking I spoke to a very rude customer service, she spoke to without remorse Am so pained and frustrated

Name: Marc C
Comments: After a heavily delayed flight, on arrival in Casablanca the luggage had not been delivered to the carousel around an hour after landing. I went to the lost luggage counter operated by Royal Air Maroc. The attendant there was extremely rude and unprofessional in her general manner. She told me my luggage was still in Frankfurt creating an enormously stressful situation from me. After trying to deal with he matter for around 20 minutes, my friend texted me to say my suitcase had arrived on the carousel after all!

Name: Lebron
Comments: I had the absolute worst experience with Royal Air Maroc! I booked a flight from Marrakech to Marseille with a stop in Casablanca, only to receive a message 6 hours before departure saying that the flight from Marrakech to Casablanca was canceled. There was no clear explanation given, leaving us completely in the dark about what was happening. They said they would provide a ride to Casablanca at 4:30 PM, but we didn’t actually hit the road until 5:30 PM! Keep in mind, our connecting flight from Casablanca to Marseille was scheduled for 7:55 PM, and the drive to Casablanca takes at least 3 to 3.5 hours. Because of this ridiculous delay, we missed our second flight to Marseille. Royal Air Maroc’s handling of the situation was chaotic and unprofessional, with no regard for their passengers’ time or plans. This caused us a huge amount of stress and inconvenience. I will definitely think twice before flying with them again.

Name: Dream66937801196
Comments: One of the worst experiences in airports of my life. Flight was over 9h delayed and they didn't give us a single piece of information. Even after the delay, they still manage to screw up boarding, leading to additional delay. Overall shocking

Name: zeinab g
Comments: A month has passed since my flight. I have not received my luggage yet. I have not been compensated. No email is answered. Complaints on the site are not handled at all. This company does not accept any responsibility for the passenger's property?😐😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😠😠😠😠 Don't trust this company

Name: S7191ZIscotts
Comments: This was my 2nd time flying this carrier. I only flew them because of the direct flight. The flight itself was not bad and the luggage handling was fine with no issues. The only issue I had and I see many comment on the same is their lack of organization at the check-in counter as well as at the gate boarding the aircraft, customer service both in the airport and onboard. I have not dealt with their customer service number to comment on that. But the staff in the airport do not crack a smile, do not welcome you and act as if you are bothering them. Flight crew were the same pretty much, no smiles, no welcoming and if you ask them a question they act as though I'm bothering them. Almost like everyone hates their job. What's going on there? I think it's time for the management at this company to look over their reviews and want to get their ratings up and try to improve on the customer service experience. Customer service is what retains repeating customers as well as word of mouth.

Name: Joe Z
Comments: The worst airlines ever I travel from dallas to Casablanca when I arrived my luggage never made it and after a week keep sending me one at the time and all my luggage arrived damaged and not c

Name: Eric O
Comments: Royal air Maroc is the worst airline you can ever fly. I have had a claim pending for 3 years and every time I call in I get told my claim is being investigated and will be settled in a matter of days. My flight was delayed for 5 days all good perished after they had lost my suitcase and was never found for days. When I ask to speak with a manager they would say there is no manager and hang up the phone. Their staff are extremely rude with terrible customer service standard. Please do not fly this airline unless you are prepared to deal with the consequences.

Name: shaheed r
Comments: I have traveled around the world. I have never experienced such unprofessional airline personnel concerning these flight arrangements. Never never again would I fly Royal Air Maroc. ABSOLUTELY HORRIBLE.

Name: Temi T
Comments: Pretty terrible experience for me. I had a connecting flight and when I got to Casablanca there was a huge line and nobody knew why we were queuing. Staff did not communicate this and were extremely slow and letting people through and I nearly missed my connecting flight. The plane wasn't clean where I was sat and to top it off they lost my luggage, and then when it did arrive it was damaged. The process for customer service to claim for this is not user friendly.

Name: Loren B
Comments: As a frequent traveler, I rely on airlines to provide a safe and comfortable journey, and unfortunately, my experience with Royal Air Maroc fell short of expectations. This review outlines the issues encountered during my recent flight, the second leg of my journey from New York to Istanbul. Arriving at CMN, a small airport, I anticipated a smooth transfer to my connecting flight. However, the use of a shuttle runner to board the plane on the tarmac presented an unexpected discomfort. The shuttle bus lacked adequate ventilation, subjecting passengers to stifling conditions with closed doors and no communication or driver for five minutes. This neglect of passenger comfort also posed a significant safety risk, which was deeply concerning. Upon boarding the plane, the discomfort escalated as the interior was exceptionally warm. The lack of adequate cooling led to distress among passengers, with reports of individuals becoming ill. Furthermore, the malfunction of approximately 85% of the in-flight entertainment systems was an additional disappointment. Requests for assistance regarding the non-functioning televisions were met with indifference from the attendants, who displayed a callous disregard for passenger experience. Adding insult to injury, the inoperative television screen installed upside down in my seat exemplified the lack of attention to detail. Although the flight eventually cooled down after takeoff, the initial discomfort and the prevalent technical issues tainted the overall experience. Despite these setbacks, the flight concluded without incident, and the plane landed safely at the destination. However, the singular food service providing a full meal, without any additional drinks or snacks, left much to be desired, especially in light of the other deficiencies experienced during the journey. In conclusion, my experience with Royal Air Maroc's CMN shuttle runner and in-flight service fell short of basic expectations. The lack of effective communication, discomfort, technical malfunctions, indifferent staff attitude, and limited food service collectively marred what should have been a seamless and enjoyable journey. As a passenger, I hope that Royal Air Maroc addresses these issues to enhance the travel experience for future customers.

Name: NorthStar00121519578
Comments: Worst customer service ever.the royal air maroc staff in JFK is unprofessional,rude and impolite especially their supervisor.

Name: prudy
Comments: They are the worst airline ever. I booked a wheelchair service for my mom, and they left her at the airport. When I called them, they told me my mom did a no-show. They couldn't tell me the whereabouts of my mom. I had to involve the British police, who contacted Interpol before I could get information on my mom. I'm still dealing with this issue with them. Also, her luggage took three days to arrive. They have the worst customer service agents ever! They are terrible!. Please avoid them at all cost!!

Name: Johanna C
Comments: I purchase 3 tickets back in 2020 right before covid then covid hit. They told me they will give me vouchers. I called back on 2021 to use them and they didn't applied them. never received confirmation for the new flight horrible. I called several time to receive the confirmation of the flight, never did. Every year I called to find out when I will received my refund and nothing

Name: Odnamra S
Comments: The flight itself was uncomfortable, with cramped seating and limited legroom. To make matters worse, the in-flight service was lackluster—staff were inattentive and the food served was subpar, the airplane was really dirty even the seats were visible damaged. Additionally, the baggage handling was problematic. Upon arrival, my luggage was damage.

Name: Kemi A
Comments: This airline Airmaroc is an highly incentive one. I traveled from Lagos Nigeria to London on the 20th of July 2024 today makes it 16 days after arriving London and one of my suitcases is yet to be delivered. The first was delivered on the 24th of July 2024 exactly 4 days after my arrival. I have sent several emails to them with no response. I have called their office with nothing concrete to say about the whereabout of my other suitcase. I want to claim from insurance I took I can't because the airline has not declared my luggage missing official today the 6th of August 2024. This is an airline that should not be flown by anyone because they are an unorganized one. With no sense of duty to passengers and I see them as a useless organization for crying out loud why would you not response to enquiries about the whereabout of a luggage I checked in with your airline. I call on everyone involved in monitoring of the aviation industry to come to my rescue and help me get justice from Airmaroc. Aderinmola Akinterinwa

Name: darlyne t
Comments: This trip was a nightmare from start to finish. After a six-hour delay on our flight from Dulles to Paris, my family and I missed our connecting flight in Casablanca. We spent hours in line for a new connection, only to be stuck in a hotel with a terrible free meal. Just when we thought it couldn't get worse, we had to use the same airline to get back home. The flight from Paris landed late in Casablanca, and we almost missed our next flight. After an exhausting eight-hour flight, we spent over an hour searching for our luggage, only to find out all seven bags were missing. Two weeks later, there's still no update. Customer support is useless, and after reading other reviews, I'm convinced our luggage was stolen. The airport won’t even tell us where it is. This airline is an absolute disaster.

Name: Kawtar A
Comments: I recently flew with Maroc Air to Dubai on flight AT 246, and I must commend the cabin manager, Mouhssine Mizhar, for his exceptional professionalism and handling of a critical situation! During our night flight, Mizhar demonstrated an extraordinary level of competence and calm when a passenger suffered a severe medical emergency. His swift and decisive actions ensured that the situation was managed with utmost care and efficiency. Mizhar's ability to remain composed under pressure was truly impressive, and his clear communication with the crew, the casualty, and Medlink was exemplary. His dedication to the passengers' well-being went above and beyond, turning a potentially dire situation into one where everyone felt cared for and secure. Beyond the emergency, Mizhar’s attentive and courteous service throughout the flight was remarkable. He maintained a high standard of professionalism, making sure all passengers were comfortable and well-informed. Mizhar's exceptional performance is a testament to his expertise and commitment to passenger safety and satisfaction!!

Name: Nour L
Comments: Expensive yet terrible customer service. Worst call center. Rude and unprofessional staff at check in . Losing luggage is nightmare experience. They should fire or retrain 90% of their current work force. Hope to see some real competition soon. Avoid this airline if you can.

Name: Michael B
Comments: I can't begin to explain how horrible this airline is and how lazy the staff is. They're late taking off, they miss connections, they misplace bags but don't care that they have any of these problems. The staff lost bags and said it could take any number of hours to find them. They transferred me to Turkish Air and their staff found them in less than 20 minutes. RAM employees are useless, especially in Morocco. This company needs to get bought out.

Name: delphine k
Comments: Because the connection in Casablanca was short (55 minutes), my suitcases were not at the arrival in Miami. I had to wait an additional 40 minutes to fill out a paper and finally did it myself as I had a pen. The next day I went to the airport and an agent told me I should wait 1 or 2 weeks (as of it was normal and was not a problem to arrive without clothes, medicines....). I asked and I got a claim number. But I realized later it was just a way to keep the client happy. The truth is that their world wide tracer for luggages is not even being updated whatever happens. I had to go to the airport 5 days later to get 1 suitcases (the other one still not arrived) but the system is still tracing it as lost even more than a week later. The staff is also so overwhelmed that I had to wait 90 minutes (until 11h20 pm) 5 days after my arrival for an agent working also for Turkish airlines to finally bring me my first suitcase, which had been tagged ("rush" in Casablanca 3 days before). I gave up calling because the only thing they can do is check in the system if there is any progress and both suitcase are still missing. What a joke! And what a frustration for me.

Name: jon k
Comments: Stay very far away from theses crooks and gangsters.. I paid large for business class from milan to miami through casablanca.. They were late, made me miss their own connection by 5 minutes , was stranded at their mercy in Casablanca.. They had the absolute worst customer service ever, when they stranded me in casablanca ,, they made me wait at airport for 4 hours while they did nothing. Then they booked me next day at 7 am cmn to jfk, to mia , they lost my luggage and never actually bought my ticket with AA to miami from JFK so once again I was stranded in JFK having to get to miami on my own without luggage. When i went to RAM desk at JFK , they told me to go away and file a complaint and completely refused to honor the business class ticket i had with them.. STAY VERY FAR AWAY!!!!

Name: donalds M
Comments: I had the worst travel experience of my life flying RAM. The take off flight leaving Abuja. Nigeria was delayed and when we got to Casablanca, there was no connecting flight to take us to Manchester as originally scheduled. We ended up sleeping in the smelly disorganized airport with no help from their customer service. After much screaming and pleading the next morning we were issued a ticket to Gatwick instead in Manchester. When we arrived Gatwick was the beginning of my nightmare! I couldn’t find my luggage. After much complaint and calls. One of my luggage’s came in 3days later and it was vandalized and all my valuables were gone! Every attempt to contact this very disgraceful airline has been futile. Don’t fly them. They are thieves on all fronts. I am yet to recover from this trauma !

Name: faissal y
Comments: don't fly with royal air maroc , i have been traveling all my life , i have never experienced any air line company like this one, the worst company ever .trust me . I git mu flight delayed by 48 hours and they let me stay in the street , they just don't care specially when is not your fault

Name: Dieynaba S
Comments: RAM is the best way to lose luggage and miss your connection flight. they will leave at the airport for 12 hours. It's the worst company ever. I will NOT recommend it to anyone.

Name: Maha E
Comments: I don’t know from where to start exactly I had a flight on the 18 of april from Casablanca back to Doha , the flight was delayed first from 2 PM to 9PM which though was frustrating because no one is helping you neither on the airport nor when you call their guest service center ! Then at 5 pm we received another message that the flight got delayed from 9 pm to 2 am in the morning , when we went to the checkin counter to ask they’re saying that its not their responsibility and they are not aware of anything as if they are not working for the company, the hostesses in the airport are a significant of the word unprofessionalism , they don’t know how to talk nor how to handle the situation . After spending almost 1h asking here and there they decided to take us to a hotel where to rest without giving a proper explanation of why this is happening or anything . 2 months later which is last week my parents were traveling from Paris back to Morocco the exact thing happened to them and what made it worst is the fact that they only informed them at the time of boarding , same scenario they took them to a hotel until the next morning while waiting for the plane my mom asked one of the uneducated, unprofessional hostesses to give her a muffin they were giving for the passengers waiting , the hostess said GO AND GRAB IT YOURSELF! Please make sure to educate your staff what is guest services and what is guest experience cuz you are humiliating yourself in from of the world !

Name: Yaya B
Comments: DO NOT FLY WITH RAM IF YOU RESPECT YOURSELF. This airline is a disgrace, they have no respect or consideration for people who give them their money for a service. All they care about in collecting your money, but your luggages, please be sure that they do not care about it and you won’t get your luggage unless it’s a backpack that you’ll keep with you. Any luggage that you check in will be lost. I came in the plane with my cabin luggage, because as usual they were late, the flight attendant told me there isn’t space anymore on the flight and he pointed out a little area on the plane where he will leave my cabin luggage. This was a trick for me to shut up and go seat down, once we arrived, I asked for my luggage just to find out that it has been removed and left in Casablanca with no tag on it. Up to this day my luggage has not been found. THIS AIRLINE NEEDS TO BE STOPPED, THEY HAVE NO SHAME AND DO NOT DESERVE TO HAVE CUSTOMER

Name: Abdel K
Comments: It’s not the first time or second Fly Morocco Airline company. Same problems every year. They horrible. The getting worse and worse

Name: Ashraf K
Comments: I had trip with this airline really I don’t recommend you to fly with Royal air maroc food (disaster) and staff are not that professional not all of them and i ask them to give me cover because i feel so cold they told me we don’t have imagine 8h without cover So i don’t recommend it and i will never fly with them Thanks

Name: Merveille D
Comments: My Grandma suffered a lot with the airline Royal Air Maroc. She has hypertension and is diabetic so she needed a wheel chair, but as soon as she landed at Casablanca, they took her wheel chair from her, claiming that other elders needed it more. Despite that fact that we have paid for her to have it the entire trip. Now she has inflation in her legs for which she needed to go to the hospital for. They were very mean, and tried to scam her saying that her passport was not valid. If not for one young lady’s help she’d probably be stranded. Never use this airline.

Name: Andrew S
Comments: I have never written a review but this was so terrible I want people to know they should never ever use this airline. They left 40-50 stranded in Casablanca and all they had to do was hold the flight a few minutes. Never got us to our final destination. Had to fly to JFK, rent a car and drive to DC.

Name: Raymond A
Comments: Please avoid this airline they are the worst airline ever, I flew from London to Lagos Nigeria on the 8 July 2024 only to discovered that my luggage is missing till today after 1 week my luggage has not been found I was told that they can't track it to know the location while another lady that we came back together was told that her luggage is in Rwanda. One whole week gone and I have not found my luggage I was only meant to spend a day in lagos because I was going for a business trip in Accra. I had to cancel my flight to accra been paying for hotel in lagos and accra hoping to see my luggage, all my medication and documentations were in the missing luggage. I'm planning of suing them when I get back to England. This is the worst Airline PLEASE BOYCOTT ROYAL AIR MOROC.

Name: Fraydoon E
Comments: They change the flight from Malaga to Casablanca and didn't change the connect flight to Washington DC so in that process we lost our connect flight which cost us big money and still could not get a penny from them after 7 month . Plus awful reservation system ( obviously!) the most inefficient customer service ever! Do not ever get even close to this airline , never. If you send anything to their serviceclient email you ll get a message saying do not send your meaasge to serviceclient@royalairmaroc.com Send it to serviceclient@royalairmaroc.com That is the same inbox , funny , right! They dont want you to contact them

Name: donalds M
Comments: This is the worst airline on Earth. You can imagine what we are currently going through. Flight time is significantly delayed and there has not been one customer service representative to address customers. This is a total failure. Never ever book this dead beat airline if you value your time and any events you had planned.

Name: Soji C
Comments: A friend recently posted on LinkedIn advising fliers never to fly Air Maroc. Today, July 13th, 2024, flying Air Maroc from Montreal through to Casablanca for a connecting flight, I had a 2 hour delay from Montreal. At Casablanca I missed the connecting flight, and was slammed with a replacement boarding pass for another flight scheduled for 24 hours! I wasn't the only passenger slammed with this. There were several others, many with little children and babies, and I cried as I saw them struggle to cope with the discomfort. No airline official to talk to us. Not any form of resources to ameliorate the pains. It is my second time on Air Maroc, and the first experience was equally unpleasant. I will keep all the boarding passes from this flight, and from today, I SHALL START A FULL FLEDGED CAMPAIGN AGAINST flying the airline. The airline is a disgrace to the hospitality that Arab nations are known for. I will go all out, on every form of social media, to show how badly the airline treats fliers. I have taken enough pictures of mothers and children sleeping on the floor and makeshift beddings from their luggage. The delay was not caused by weather conditions or natural events. It was totally the airlines problem! PLEASE NEVER CONSIDER FLYING AIR MAROC EVEN IF IT IT THE CHEAPEST THAT YOU COULD FIND! EVERYTHING HOSPITALITY ABOUT THE AIRLINE IS POOR! EXTREMELY POOR! MOROCCO SHOULD BE ASHAMED OF THIS ENTERPRISE! THE ARAB NATION NATIONS SHOULD BE ASHAMED OF IT! THE AIRLINE TREATS HUMANS LIKE STRAYED ANIMALS! PLEASE DO NOT PATRONIZE IT!

Name: Traveler16658437155
Comments: Terrible customer service. The people act as if they do not understand English when it comes to navigating the airport . Not willing to assist in any way

Name: zineb h
Comments: Worst customer service ever. We had a flight today paid 500£/person for it I'm allowed to 23kg checked in baggage, 10kg hand luggage + one personal item. The rude lady at check-in, in casablanca airport told us that the total of personal item and hand luggage has to be 10kg. Which I never heard of in my life. The problem was that the check-in luggage was only 18kg still she was insisting on reducing the hand luggage and the back pack which only had my laptop and tablet in it to 10kg. Otherwise I have to pay 40£ extra for it. She was so rude to the point she left us standing at the check-in counter and opened another one. I asked for a supervisor and then one off the check-in agents came and said she was the supervisor with no name tag and refused to give her name. I made her aware that I'm a pregnant lady who's really sick and you guys are stressing me out and making me do extra work for no reason as the total of my luggage is not over weight. She did not care about that and said if u pass out with the stress we will call an ambulance in a very rude way. I find this very disrespectful as a costumer who paid a lot of money for my flight and for someone who doesn't care about my welfare. This was my second bad experience with royal air maroc. I didn't complain before but this time they made me cry as no body deserve to be treated like this. I would not recommend this company to anybody.

Name: mohamed r
Comments: 1) we were allowed 4 suitcases. We had 3 . One bag was 2 lbs over . They asked us to move things to reduce the weight.2) #grumpyface : none of the front desk folks had a smile. They were possed to be at work 3) there about 5 hostess in the business class : they take turns to sleep on a 7 hour flight 4) this remind me of Indian Airlines in 2000 5) They have the World Cup in 2030 and they have and airline from 2000s 6 ) Bed are not lie flat 7)Food bring your own :8)Very old planes Easy to fix #service #customerservice #foodquality . They need to hire a new leader from a repair line like emirates or Singapore who can change the culture

Name: Scott F
Comments: This airline is not one I would ever use again. I only used them because their flight times were perfect for our vacation and they are a One World partner with American Airlines, but someone at AA should really evaluate that because this airline was pretty terrible. The plane was so dirty I can't even really find words to describe it. The food didn't seem terrible until we all had it exploding out of our body in the restrooms around Miami (sorry to multiple Miami businesses for what we did to your bathrooms as a result). No WiFi on a 9 hour flight and the screen in three of the four seats didn't work correctly. They also take any water you have, including what you buy in the airport and only give you a couple paper cups full of water for the entire flight. I wouldn't recommend this airline to anyone, including enemies!

Name: T.Cameron
Comments: HORRIBLE AIRLINE. Check in at Casa Blanca was terrible including fights at the baggage transfer lines. The plane was dirty, food was bad, we only had two glasses offered of water throughout the flight. Screens were not working in our area and so headsets did not work.

Name: Charlotte B
Comments: My experience with RAM was catastrophic, so much so that I vowed never to fly with them again, even if it cost me more. On a stopover in Casablanca (to Marrakech), the plane was delayed for over 6 hours. 6 hours of stress without any clear information being given, without water or snacks (we were stuck in a terminal with no shops or anything). After this incident (more than a year ago), the airline offered compensation but never made the transfer, despite hundreds of written messages by e-mail, twitter and telephone (a paying service). No doubt they hope their aggrieved customers will forget... This is a company to flee, unreliable and with an incompetent after-sales service.

Name: Sara
Comments: Worst airline ever. Please please save yourself headache, money and time and DO NOT book this airline. The customer service is AWFUL on the phone. They shout at you, talk over you, tell you you're lying. They're VERY BAD. The airport staff have NO idea. It's totally useless. Please don't book this airline.

Name: Destination551312
Comments: A good trip overall. The New York to Casablanca flight was during the day with a two hour layover in Casablanca before the flight to Monrovia. Both flights were full. The 3.5 hour flight from Casablanca to Monrovia left at 1:30 a.m., and they served a full meal. Both flights were full and the service was fine. The return flights were also ok. The crew on the Monrovia to Casablanca leg were a little less organized and seemed to have a harder team dealing with passengers on the full flight. A cold breakfast on that leg, but more than you get on many US airlines on international flights.

Name: David T
Comments: Do not use this airline. They took our bags, cancelled our flight and never cared to contact us regarding any of the incidents. Took over a week to get two of our bags back after over a dozen calls. No idea where the rest of them are. Everyone over the phone promises refunds and that the bags will be returned but no one ever follows through. We’ve been told multiple times someone will contact us but no ever one does. They are just trying to get you off the phone. Not sure how they can do business in the US.

Name: Jack V
Comments: Three other reviews from the same flight I was on here. We got diverted to Boston when our destination was IAD (Washington DC). Originally had to wait for a 3 hour delay in Casablanca. After take off, we’re then forced to exit the plane in Boston. The airline never gave us any method of getting to our destination. Had to miss a day of work and pay several hundred dollars in same day flight tickets to make it home. Still haven’t heard from RAM. Avoid. Avoid. Avoid.

Name: NorthStar09493949417
Comments: Horrendous Experience. They lost my suitcase, which I guess happens, but I couldn't get in touch with anyone from their side to get any help. In addition, flight was delayed for an hour, then once we boarded, they kept us on the ground for 2 more hours, so that passenger from another delayed flight could catch this flight. In addition, Casablanca airport is the most stressful airport I have ever experienced. Airport staff trying to get you to tip them left and right, and Wi-Fi barely working. I will definitely be avoiding this airline at all costs.

Name: GCLAN4
Comments: America. Avoid this airline. Read the reviews. It's all true. Cancelled flights....they intentionally force American travelers to spend 24 hours in a garbage dump of a city, Casablanca. Stolen Luggage...yes, the staff will STEAL your luggage at the airport: you are NOT getting your luggage back! It's being sold to another tourist in a crime infested Medina. Rude, incompetent, and lazy staff across the board. A GIANT TOILET! In fact, I will NEVER travel through Morroco again, for any reason. Also, file a dispute with your VISA/Mastercard. Get the charges reversed.

Name: PassportGregory
Comments: Without a doubt, the worst customer service of any international airline. Theie service reps are arrogant, short tempered and very rude. Never fly this horrible airline.

Name: Luthilu
Comments: This was the complaint that I sent to Royal Air Maroc Booking Reference: RA7MGF Flight Number: QR4567 On 29th March 2024 I booked my flight to Casablanca, Morocco as well as one from Casablanca to the UK. At the end of April, my husband visited the Royal Air Maroc office in Doha, Qatar, where we are residents. He went in to try and organise our seats as we were flying for the first time with our 10 month old son and wanted the bassinet seating. He was told that because we had booked early, we could not reserve seats. However, they were able to change mine and the baby’s seat from Morocco to the UK, my husband would be charged so we just stuck with my seat and the baby’s. They then told us that because the flight was Qatar Airways, we would need to reserve our seats through them; we tried and they told us it was a Royal Air Maroc flight and so it was up to them. We were told to just wait until we get to the airport and make the request then. On 14th June (the weekend before Eid) we had a flight 01.35 so because we knew it would be busy, we arrived at the terminal for 9pm. There was already a queue for the Royal Air Maroc check in, some people had queued for an hour already!. When check-in finally opened, the men ‘organising’ the queuing system had not taken any note of who had been queuing the longest and so they just let people go in any order. As you can imagine, arguments and fights broke out. By the time we got to check in, we were told that there were no bassinet seats left; what a surprise! Check in took so long that we had less than an hour to go to use the facilities, see duty free and then get ready for boarding. We were told to be ready for boarding at 12.35am! We got there early and the queue was huge. There was nowhere to sit and it was chaos. There was no way that the flight was leaving at 01.35am. Usually, with most other airlines, when boarding is ready, business class goes first, then families and then in order of the plane from back to front. Of course, this did not happen with Royal Air Maroc, it was a free for all. There were elderly people, pregnant women, families with small babies all being knocked about by those who just wanted to get on the flight. We stayed and waited, not wanting our child to have to sit on a stuffy plane for any longer than need be. Quite honestly, it was a disgrace. When we finally saw the back of the queue, one of the ladies checking boarding passes moved us forward, not that it made much difference because the man getting everyone on the bus was horrendous. He was trying to put so many people on the bus that he asked us to take a baby out of the pushchair we had whilst he was fast asleep just so he could squeeze us on the bus. This meant that we had a grumpy baby, standing room only, and when the bus moved, we were being thrown all over the bus so my husband was struggling to hold our 10kgs son when we could have just waited for the next bus! On the flight, our luggage just got scattered across the plane. We had a window seat and a middle seat, luckily the person in the aisle seat was very understanding. As our son wanted to sleep, I had to lay him on my lap and the food tray in front of me for him to get any comfort. I missed the meal and there was no consideration for this later. No one checked in and asked if I needed anything. My husband shared his food with me. Because we were busy with our son, we missed the point where they collected the food trays in, so we called for help to have it removed so we could change our son’s nappy and then we could rest. It took 30mins for someone to come and help us! The staff could be seen chatting and having a drink but not one came out until they were done. So my son was screaming to be changed much to the annoyance of passengers I’m sure all because not one cabin crew member could be bothered to come and check on us. Please note that we weren’t the only ones waiting. By the time the cabin crew finished, there were 6 lights on just in our section! Finally, why don’t you have female cabin crew in all areas? Is it appropriate to only have males? Overall, if I had to choose next time, I would go with the Qatar Airways flight in the morning. I just hope that more passengers complain because the situations above are avoidable with some common sense and basic organisation skills.

Name: Margaret H
Comments: Despite arriving 3 hrs before departure and standing in queue with only 5 passengers ahead of me the luggage checkin too so long by the time we reached the desk we were told it was too late - this despite one woman ( the supervisor apparently) walking up and down telling passengers for Brussels to move to the front but nothing about London (our destination) - when I asked her she replied - we are not obliged to alert you (????!!!!!) literally each person checking in ahead of us took 20 mins minimum to have a tag put on their bag and for some reason this had to be done manually each time by the employee who, each time, left her desk to fetch said tickets from another location. She then took each persons passport to someone else to be double checked - why? Beginning to wonder if she even worked there or if it was some kind of candid camera set up - whole thing a joke - had to pay for another flight, extra accommodation etc - total nightmare start to finish - customer service where I rebooked couldn’t have cared less - mentioned we had arrived at airport on time I was told - we will check cctv cameras!!! Security just as bad - customs guy stopping all attractive young girls asking them questions waving everyone else through, security police leaving you standing 5-10 mins to be waived through the scanner while they text their mates, passport control like the baggage check in - didn’t seem to have a clue how to use their computers, running about with peoples passports to double check them with other colleagues standing around behind them - honestly crazy, frustrating and staff downright rude and incompetent - so sad that such a beautiful country and wonderful people so badly let down by their airport and airport staff - puts me off going back sadly.

Name: Stuart
Comments: What first appears a discount airline fare must be reconsidered in terms of comfort, reliability and communication. It fails woefully on each count. A smaller company with little reserves- one maintenance problem means one day delay, provided accommodations are simply awful, and communication nonexistent. Staff friendly but overwhelmed, hours waiting on airport tarmac/in lounge/in parking lot only to be canceled, thus making connections impossible. Old plane, poorly maintained outside and in, no drinks nor food, short staffed- what’s not to like? Old adage: pay more, get more.

Name: J M
Comments: Flying with Royal Air Marco was an absolute nightmare. There was a 3.5 hour delay with no communication. After finally getting on the plane the journey was fine until they told us 30 minutes out from our destination that they were no longer landing there and instead re-routing to Boston. They held us on the plane for 2 hours with no outlets and zero service. They provided 0 information. All they said was that information was coming. Someone would come. They never did. Boston Logan doesn’t even have a staff for Royal Air Morac. All they did was tell us stay and wait. Because we did as they advised, we all got stuck after hours at the airport completely stranded to find our own accommodations and travel plans. I spend over $500 trying to get a last minute hotel and renting a car. The drive home was 10 hours. Still , 4 days later and we’ve heard nothing. The lack of communication is the worst part. If they were upfront that they didn’t know what was going on and that they couldn’t help us, everyone could’ve helped themselves faster. They left pregnant women, small children, and everyone stranded at midnight and offered no help or refunds. It was a terrible experience and they should be embarrassed by how poorly they handled everything.

Name: lindab6318
Comments: This was a bad ending to an otherwise wonderful trip. Our flight home from a Mediterranean Cruise was supposed to be from Barcelona to Casablanca, with an hour layover, then on to our final destination of Dulles. The first flight was fine. The connecting flight from Casablanca took off 3 1/2 hours late. There was very little communications on why we were late and what was going on. Once in the air, we were notified the plane was being diverted to Boston. When we landed, we were told there was technical issues and we had to remain on the plane. After more than an hour, they let us off and told us to retrieve our luggage. Once off the plane, there was no one at the airport to provide us with any information. We were not given food or hotel vouchers. We were not given alternatives to getting to our final destination. After a few hours, the airport supplied cots for us to sleep on. The crew came through about 3 hours after we arrived. We were asking questions of the crew and not one of them opened their mouth to tell us what was going on. They simply walked away. We finally made arrangements to get home by train. We received 3 emails stating we would get an update by 15:00, then 16:00 and finally 18:30. Needless to say, no update every came. We still don't know what happened. Hopefully everyone finally made it home. The airline should be ashamed of themselves for how they treated paying customers! Communication is always the best practice.

Name: William B
Comments: On June 23rd, around 11:00 PM EST. The right engine of Boeing 787 Royal Air Maroc AT218 failed 2 hours from any land. We emergency landed at Boston where no staff were to be found. We were left stranded with no representatives, no info on flight, no vouchers for hotels. People were missing luggage, people didn't speak english, and people were scared. 261 people were left stranded in one of the most expensive cities in the world 10 hours driving distance from our intended destination with all flights from other airlines being 500$ or more for a flight the next day. 27 hours later and Royal Air Maroc has yet to even acknowledge what happened. The flight that was supposed to be after our flight from Dulles to Casablanca has now been delayed over 24 hours with Royal Air Maroc also refusing to offer hotels, vouchers, and explanations to those passengers. They were also aware the plane was having engine issues while we were waiting in Casablanca as they delayed our flight by 4 hours due to "technical issues" and decided to fly it anyway. We landed with 1 working engine to emergency vehicles. On my flight from Dulles To Casablana, had no issues. On way back from Casablanca to Dulles, worst day of my life. Avoid them. Fly to europe for a day and take a european airline the next. As they care about their passengers.

Name: Isabel I
Comments: Royal Air Maroc, you still owe me $341.91! RAM completely destroyed my luggage and STILL hasn't reimbursed me after months of calling and emailing. The absolute worst customer service from any company I have ever experienced. Avoid at all costs. Just awful.

Name: Cyrus p
Comments: Yesterday I meet the most unfriendly and rude stewarders in my all flights in my life . I left my phone on the airplan. My next fly was after hour and a half I had time to catch the next plane to Amsterdam. I had to run from one douane to another and inquire. In the end they said that my phone would be given to me at the geat by the security. I went to the geat but they didn't know enything about it ? they send me to the airplan and they said security will give it on me there. I went to the airplan I wanted to tell her my story, but she didn't even let me finish, what i was saying , she said that I had to go to teak my seat! as we know in these cases if you refuse they can create all kinds of problems for you.So I had to leave my phone behaind. Everybody know how important a mobile phone can be for someone. They had find my telephon but she wouldent listen to me!! I Would never fly with this airline again or recommend this to no one.

Name: Raintree_Thailand
Comments: We were on a short flight from Barcelona to Casablanca. Check-in was slow but nice and friendly (the agent managed to move my wife and I to sit together despite us not being able to get seats together through the online check-in). Boarding was slow. The flight itself was smooth enough. They gave a small snack of tuna sandwich, cupcake, yogurt, and a requested beer (absolutely horrendous Flag Speiciale). Sadly, things turned from mediocre to much worse upon arrival in Casablanca, when I found my luggage had been badly damaged. After waiting in line at a "customer service" baggage counter for more than 30 minutes (with staff milling around doing nothing and uncaring about customers), when I finally reached the counter, they sent me to a second baggage service counter on the other side of the terminal. More waiting until finally an agent quickly provided me with a claim number and said I needed file a claim online. I've done so, but am yet to receive a response other than an acknolwedgment of my request for reimbursement for the damage.

Name: Raja Y
Comments: The experience was not good at all . The flight departure was delayed from Dubai 1 hr and few minutes, it supposed to be at 14:55 the thing is that we had to go to Casablanca for transit to reach Marrakesh … the team already know about the delay which will lead us to miss the next flight but they said it is ok the next flight will wait for you , when we reached the airport to take the flight to Marrakesh which was at 21:50 the door was closed nd nobody was waiting for us as it was mentioned before , we were almost 9 people who didnt attend the plan . We asked for the nearest flight nd they gave us boarding pass with a flight at 22:50 - unfortunately we had to wait until 1:10 AM . We reached the airport at 2:25 AM tired nd no energey . They supposed to refund us if they really care about their passengers or else they should provide good service as we are paying money not rocks …

Name: Jack K
Comments: Upgrading to business class at Royal Air Maroc counter in Morocco. Asked the counter lady to confirm if business class was a "regular" one with seats that recline to a bed. She confirmed - of course! Turned out - regular seats with no TV screen. What a SCAM. DON'T get a business class upgrade - you'll just throw away your money

Name: Millie T
Comments: The worst airline ever!! This was my first time flying this airline. I am very disappointed in the quality of the aircraft and the service by the flight attendants. The negative vibes started with a visit to the Royal Air Maroc lounge in Casablanca. I hesitate to call it lounge. It was extremely crowded , only one shower and very hard to find. I ended up using a priority pass lounge, which was much nicer. At the gate in Casablanca, total disorganization by the ground crew. First, we were told gate 9 and as we were lining up, the gate was switched to 8, with no one answering any questions and being quite rude. Plus, we started boarding at 10:25 when we were supposed to depart at 10:55. Then I get to my seat, 3A in business. There was a tiny little pillow on my seat, and no blanket. Also, there was a big gap between the seat back and the seat bottom. which made it very uncomfortable for seven hour flight I have flown with numerous airlines and the flight attendants always come around to offer water or drinks during the flight. Once food service was over, they never came around offering drinks. The seatbelt came on; on other airlines, the flight attendants always come around to check to make sure the passengers have put on their seatbelts. On this flight noone came around to check. Also, the lavatory was a mess. Usually the flight attendants check and tidy the bathroom. This flight definitely did not feel like a business class experience. I sent an email to Royal Air Maroc and have not received a response.

Name: jesmar
Comments: Racist, irresponsible, scam, and rude Royal Air Maroc has been the worst airline I have traveled with. I hope many people read this message and don't buy tickets to fly with them. I flew from Miami to Madrid with a connection in Casablanca and my suitcases never arrived, I made a claim and the people in charge and costumer service always have the same rude answer: “we do not have an update for the airport” “what is your problem, it is just a month you have to wait” and they even mistreated me just because of my accent; I could hear people laughing in the background. I have wrote many emails, I have made a claim for the refund or compensation and I have not received any answer. They are irresponsible, they lose your suitcases, they are a disaster, they treat you rudely and hang up the phone, They laugh at your desperation and your accent. It's quite sad to know that these are the values upheld by the company. I am going to take this as far as I can. It's unacceptable. I will post it on all social media platforms and on my professional profile. These are not the values of the United States of America. THE WORST AIRLINE IN THE WORLD EVER ….

Name: Blissfull B
Comments: I have used this airline before but trust me, the 1st time I had been on an aeroplane where I had to clean the seat before sitting and the last is Royal Air Maroc!!! I have never felt so humiliated in all my life when ignored on this flight from London Gatwick to Banjul. I am vegetarian and just wanted to know if I could receive another fruit juice instead of fruits as I am allergic to dairy and did not wish to cause drama on the flight, so I strictly stayed away from dairy. After being late by an hour the baggage claims decided NOT to load all customers' luggage onto the plane so though I was first in the queue at the airport and hours early, I was more than disappointed to realise when landing in Banjul that my luggage with mostly stuff for charity had been left in Morocco! on purpose to make up for the lost time and being late. Then after a month and halfway through my trip, going to the Maroc office in Banjul only to find out and realise that though receptionists had been working there for 15 years they had no training in customer service and I had to teach them how to do their jobs and take them seriously! I advise you now if you are reading this to NEVER trust this airline as the seats on the plane are dirty, worn and tattered and there is NOTHING royal about this airline. I will never waste time, energy or money again on them and when they mess with the wrong customer they will finally be sued and go out of business. Ase. One of the largest disasters in my life and this has never happened in all my travelling days before! I, family and friends are horrified at this airline!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Name: Russ R
Comments: It wasn't the worst flight ever nor the best. The airline is average with below average entertainment and food choices. It was on time, so there is a positive aspect.

Name: Antoni P
Comments: TERRIBLE. Dirty, very dirty. Food: just fish (same odoro than the plan) Worst of all: they have LOST OUR LUGGAGE. No one signed up a claim, we just filled a form but couldn’t get a claim/ref number to follow up, just take a pocture. Till ow, no one called/email us, no one answers any phone, mails get auto-answers.

Name: Ronya A
Comments: This is the WORST airline I have EVER flown. Please do yourself a favor and do not fly with this airline. Each flight we had was delayed, almost missed our second connecting flight, had the worst customer service, they lost our 2 bags, they don’t have the technology to “track” your bag like other airlines do and customer service is an absolute JOKE - completely makes you go through hoops. They really do nothing for their customers. I know this is a cheaper way to fly around but you’re better off booking Spirit than this fools

Name: Charles S
Comments: Absolute nightmare of an experience. They lost all of our luggage, and offered no help to try and resolve the issue. Staff was rude and changed my wife’s seat as we were boarding the plane without explanation. (We were in row 10, she got moved to row 33) we flew 10 hours on 2 opposite ends of the plane. On the return flight one flight attendant was smoking a vape in the back of the plane. The list of issues goes on but the biggest thing is the lost luggage. I have never had an airline not be able to give any help with luggage that they lost. Do not fly this airline, you will regret it!

Name: sharrin4
Comments: Absolutely horrific experience. Flight from DC to Lisbon, with a connection in Casablanca, went as scheduled. The issue was that ~8 hour overnight flight had no AC and was sweltering hot with half the entertainment screens on the flight non functional. The intiaip flight from Barcelona back to the US was delayed 3 hours after boarding. While sitting in the aircraft for those 3 hours, passengers were never given any updates aside from a very vague “issues with paperwork” and the continuous “we are taking off shortly” every 10-20 minutes. Connecting flights with the same airline were never delayed and replacement flights were scheduled for 48 hours later. After waiting at the Royal Air Maroc counter for an additional 3 hours (many people gave up an accepted the 48 hour alternate flight), flights back to Lisbon and then to the US (with a different airline) were booked for those remaining. We were offered overnight stay in a poor quality hotel outside of Casablanca during the delay. I will absolutely never even consider flying with Royal Air Maroc again as this is the worst service, communication, and overall flying experience I’ve ever been subjected to, in what is already a universally awful industry in air travel. I would pay several hundreds more for a run of the mill, average airline. This one is truly bottom of the barrel.

Name: najib z
Comments: Please please please don’t use this airline. First, there is always a problem with timing , always late. Customer service inside the plane is horrible, bathrooms don’t get cleaned for 8 hours flight , food is horrible . 90% they will loose your baggage and won’t replace it . There is non communication. Pay an extra $100 and use a better airline . I flew with them for 20 years from USA and every time I say this is the last one . They even didn’t compensate us for lost baggage.

Name: Stephen D
Comments: Worst airline on the planet. Every employee you meet is somehow dumber than the next and rude. Airline lost my bag and didn’t even pretend to look for it while I was on a foreign country with no belongings. 8 nights, zero progress. Do not fly. It would be easier to swim across the Atlantic. Plane was gross, headphones didn’t work.

Name: Shereeali
Comments: Royal Air Maroc did not bring my hold back to Paris on 8 March, I raised the loss in the airport on 8 March. I raised a complaint on 11 March online with RAM. They said i had to wait 21 days. 21 days passed, and still no bag, and no trace of my bag. They said I am entitled to full compensation. Since 11 March I have called 15 times and sent 15 follow up emails. Each time i am told over the phone, that the complaint has been raised and they will chase it. I have had no email responses. Your service is shocking and your system for baggage is terrible. I don't believe there is a compensation scheme, as I am continually being ignored. I will now raise my complaint with KINGDOM OF MOROCCO, MINISTRY OF TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS, GENERAL DIRECTORATE OF CIVIL AVIATION. This is the second complaint i have raised about lost baggage, the first time was 5 Jan 2024, and that case is also still "pending"

Name: Ito
Comments: If I could give negative stars, I would. Worst experience of my life. Flight was delayed an hour and a half and missed connecting flight. The worst part, however, was that each of RAM’s employees lied to our faces multiple times, and even laughed at our misery and frustration. They should all be ashamed.

Name: Melisa A
Comments: Horrible service. Had suitcase broken into and theft of belonging by the luggage handlers. When filed a complain with the airline, they simple said you shouldn’t have carried these items with you and they can’t do anything.

Name: Journey15140597898
Comments: This is the worst airline I have ever travelled with. It took 12 hours from Marrakech to Lisbon!! The seats on the boarding passes did not reflect the electronic receipt. People were allowed to sit anywhere!!! Delayed, delayed and delayed. the gate we departed from (eventually) kept saying the destination was Paris CDG, information had no idea ("I don't have a computer so I don't know" was the response). What was the point of him being there!!!
